Introducing Apple Pay on Razorpay: A New Era of Frictionless Global Payments [September 16, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-launches-apple-pay/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: Apple Pay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Apple-Pay-Blog-3-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Apple-Pay-Blog-3.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F&text=Introducing%20Apple%20Pay%20on%20Razorpay%3A%20A%20New%20Era%20of%20Frictionless%20Global%20Payments "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Introducing%20Apple%20Pay%20on%20Razorpay%3A%20A%20New%20Era%20of%20Frictionless%20Global%20Payments&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F "Email") Indian brands are going global like never before. From fashion and luxury to SaaS and digital services, businesses from India are reaching customers in New York, London, Singapore, and beyond. But with global growth comes higher expectations. Shoppers overseas want the same seamless checkout experience they enjoy from the world’s biggest brands. They want payments that feel fast, secure, and effortless. They want trust built into every tap. And Indian businesses, to compete on the global stage, need to deliver nothing less. That’s why we’re delighted to announce that Razorpay has become the **first Indian payment aggregator** to launch **Apple Pay for International Payments**. Indian businesses selling abroad can offer their global customers one of the world’s most trusted, most loved, and most seamless payment methods – directly on their Razorpay checkout. ![Image 3: Apple Pay](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2025/09/Screenshot-2025-09-15-at-4.42.35%E2%80%AFPM.png) ## What it means to get paid the Apple way ## ![Image 4: Apple pay](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2025/09/4923950008328331947applepayvideo4-ezgif.com-video-to-gif-converter.gif) The Apple way of getting paid is all about ease, speed, and trust. In other words, your global customers see a checkout that needs only a single tap, and a payment method they already know and love. ## Go Global, the Apple Way **Give your customers the speed, trust, and ease they already love, now on Razorpay.** [Enable Apple Pay Today](https://razorpay.typeform.com/to/ALhOQrHG?utm_source=blog1) ## **Why Apple Pay will redefine international payments for your business** ### **1. Frictionless Experience for Global Buyers** Every checkout drop-off hurts. A customer finds your product, adds it to their cart, but abandons when the payment experience feels clunky or untrustworthy. Apple Pay solves this with 1-tap authentication using Face ID or Touch ID, making payments faster than ever. ### **2. Built-in Trust, Loved Worldwide** Apple Pay is used by hundreds of millions of iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch users across the globe. For your customers, seeing the familiar Apple Pay button builds instant confidence in your brand. ### **3. Higher Conversions, Lower Drop-offs** Merchants worldwide have reported conversion uplifts of up to 58% when enabling Apple Pay. Merchants who’ve gone live on Razorpay already are reporting success rates in excess of 90%. A smoother, more secure payment experience directly translates to higher revenue. ### **4. Global Coverage with Razorpay’s International Payments** Apple Pay is now part of our [International Payments suite](https://razorpay.com/accept-international-payments/), alongside global card payments (Visa, Mastercard, AmEx, and Diners) and [international bank transfers](https://razorpay.com/accept-international-payments/bank-transfers/). Whether your customer is in New York, London, or Singapore, you can accept payments

with the methods they trust most. ## **How to Enable Apple Pay on Razorpay** 1. **If you’re on our Standard Checkout** * Fill out the form below to register your interest. * Then, we’ll guide you through a simple activation process. * Apple Pay will then be enabled on your Razorpay International Payments account. * Your customers will automatically see the Apple Pay button when they’re on an Apple device. 1. **If you’re using an e-commerce platform (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento etc.)** * Fill out the form below to register your interest. * We’ll guide you through the necessary steps. * Apple Pay will then be enabled on your Razorpay International Payments account. * Your customers will automatically see the Apple Pay button when they’re on an Apple device. 1. **If you’re using Custom/S2S libraries** * Our solution for these integrations will go live shortly. Fill out the form below for early access. We’ll notify you when we’re ready to take you live! ## Go Global, the Apple Way **Give your customers the speed, trust, and ease they already love, now on Razorpay.** [Enable Apple Pay Today](https://razorpay.typeform.com/to/ALhOQrHG?utm_source=blog1) **Compliance & Guidelines** Apple has clear rules for how the Apple Pay mark and button should appear on your checkout. Following these is mandatory for businesses. 👉 [See Apple’s official guidelines here](https://developer.apple.com/apple-pay/marketing/) ## **Ready to Go Live?** With Apple Pay on Razorpay, Indian businesses are no longer competing just on product or price; you’re competing with the world’s best on experience. ## Go Global, the Apple Way **Give your customers the speed, trust, and ease they already love, now on Razorpay.** [Enable Apple Pay Today](https://razorpay.typeform.com/to/ALhOQrHG?utm_source=blog1) [Apple Pay](https://razorpay.com/blog/tag/apple-pay/) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F&text=Introducing%20Apple%20Pay%20on%20Razorpay%3A%20A%20New%20Era%20of%20Frictionless%20Global%20Payments "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-launches-apple-pay%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F09%2FApple-Pay-Blog-3.png&description=Introducing%20Apple%20Pay%20on%20Razorpay%3A%20A%20New%20Era%20of%20Frictionless%20Global%20Payments "Pinterest") ![Image 5](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/737a15176a301fe75280e59a143ae8075ec87f26f560d9212c6f94aa61dee682?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Chidananda Vasudeva](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/chidananda-vasudevarazorpay-com/ "Posts by Chidananda Vasudeva") Chidananda Vasudeva S is a Senior Product Marketing Manager at Razorpay, where he leads Razorpay’s cross-border payments vertical. He plays a key role in positioning and scaling solutions that simplify international payments for Indian businesses, enabling seamless global expansion. A graduate of the Indian School of Business (Class of 2021), Chidananda brings a unique blend of analytical acumen and storytelling to the fintech space. Prior to Razorpay, he spent over nine years as a sports journalist with The Hindu, where he covered major ICC tournaments and led the Bangalore sports bureau. This diverse experience helps him bridge customer insight with product strategy in high-growth tech environments. * [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chidananda-vasudeva-s-18975416 "LinkedIn") #### Related Posts [![Image 6: How Global Businesses Eliminated AML Settlement Delays with Smart AML Screener by Razorpay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/unnamed-1-770x515.jpg)](https://razorpay.com/blog/how-global-businesses-eliminated-aml-settlement-delays-with-smart-aml-screener-by-razorpay/ "How Global Businesses Eliminated AML Settlement Delays with Smart AML Screener by Razorpay") ### [How Global Businesses Eliminated AML Settlement Delays with Smart AML Screener by Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/blog/how-global-businesses-eliminated-aml-settlement-delays-with-smart-aml-screener-by-razorpay/) March 11, 2026 [![Image 7: Instant Reimbursements on RazorpayX Payroll: A delighter for Employees and organisations alike](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Instant-Reimbursements-770x515.png)](https://razorpay.com/blog/instant-reimbursements-on-razorpayx-payroll-a-delighter-for-employees-and-organisations-alike/ "Instant Reimbursements on RazorpayX Payroll: A delighter for Employees and organisations alike") ### [Instant Reimbursements on RazorpayX Payroll: A delighter for Employees and organisations alike](https://razorpay.com/blog/instant-reimbursements-on-razorpayx-payroll-a-delighter-for-employees-and-organisations-alike/) March 9, 2026 [![Image 8: MoneySaver Export Account](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Gemini_Generated_Image_9pwdii9pwdii9pwd-770x515.png)](https://razorpay.com/blog/altview-razorpay-moneysaver-export-account/ "How AltView Advisory Streamlined Global Payments

US-based CloudHire partners with Razorpay to scale AI-driven hiring across India [December 5, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/us-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: US-based CloudHire partners with Razorpay to scale AI-driven hiring across India](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Cloudhire-banner-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Cloudhire-banner.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F&text=US-based%20CloudHire%20partners%20with%20Razorpay%20to%20scale%20AI-driven%20hiring%20across%20India "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=US-based%20CloudHire%20partners%20with%20Razorpay%20to%20scale%20AI-driven%20hiring%20across%20India&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F "Email") India has become one of the most important markets for global AI SaaS companies. Millions of teams, founders, and fast-growing startups in India adopt AI tools every day. They look for tools that help them ship faster, hire smarter, and operate globally. [CloudHire](https://cloudhire.ai/) is one of the companies leading that shift. Today, CloudHire is also one of India’s fastest-growing AI-powered recruitment platforms, connecting job seekers and recruiters seamlessly in one place. It helps businesses hire high-quality talent using AI. Recruiters use CloudHire for pre-screened candidate pools, structured skill-based filtering, and data-driven insights, while job seekers use it to validate skills, improve resumes, and increase visibility. Companies use CloudHire to find, screen, and match candidates with speed and accuracy. As CloudHire grew, interest from India kept rising. Indian customers were signing up, testing the product, and asking for a simple way to pay locally. For a US based company, this was the moment that signalled a real opportunity. India was not just another market. It was becoming one of CloudHire’s strongest growth drivers. CloudHire wanted to move fast and meet that demand. To make that happen, CloudHire needed to adapt to the India way of being. They needed to offer payment methods Indian customers use every day, like UPI. They needed a checkout experience that felt familiar and smooth. They needed to go live fast. And they needed compliance sorted from day one, without setting up an India entity. This is where the shift happened CloudHire partnered with Razorpay to make India a market they could enter and scale quickly. ## **What CloudHire Needed** * To cater to a diverse set of Indian customers & their payments behaviour. UPI Scan and Pay. Debit cards. Credit cards. EMIs. Everything Indians expect. * A checkout made for India. Fast. Familiar. Zero friction. * A simple go-live. No heavy lifting. No legal counsel. No compliance maze to navigate. * INR payments for Indian customers. But, USD settlements in their bank account. * Reliable infrastructure with high success rates, and no drop offs. * Timely settlements ## **How the Partnership Helped** * **Every payment method Indians swear by.****** UPI, cards, netbanking, EMIs. If Indian customers prefer it, CloudHire now accepts it. One integration. Zero complexity. * **A checkout that speaks India.**Fast. Familiar. No friction. CloudHire’s payment flow now feels instantly native to Indian users,

which means fewer drop-offs and more completed payments.![Image 3](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/ScreenRecording2025-11-26at1.05.36PM-ezgif.com-crop.gif) * **Compliance on autopilot.** No India entity setup. No legal loops. No regulatory guesswork. Razorpay handled PACB, PAPG and all other compliance norms from day one, so CloudHire could focus on growth, not paperwork. * **Local currency for users. Global currency for CloudHire.** Indian customers pay in INR. CloudHire receives settlements in USD. FX, routing, reporting, all taken care of behind the scenes by Razorpay. * **Success rates that actually deliver.****** CloudHire now clocks**over 90% success rates**across flows. No jitters. No drop-offs. Just smooth, reliable payments that keep Indian customers moving from checkout to “done” in seconds. * **A dashboard to monitor it all****** One view for transactions, settlements, refunds, and alerts. Real-time insights. Automated reconciliation. Less firefighting, more clarity. AI SaaS companies from across the world are entering India. CloudHire is one more proof that it does not have to be complex. If you’re a global company and want to serve Indian customers, Razorpay helps you go live fast. No entity. No paperwork. Compliance built in. [Get In Touch!](https://razorpay.typeform.com/to/C5OlR4YQ?utm_source=CloudHire[%E2%80%A6]xxxxx&utm_term=xxxxx&utm_content=xxxxx&utm_placement=xxxxx) [cloudhire](https://razorpay.com/blog/tag/cloudhire/)[import payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/tag/import-payments/) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F&text=US-based%20CloudHire%20partners%20with%20Razorpay%20to%20scale%20AI-driven%20hiring%20across%20India "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fus-based-cloudhire-partners-with-razorpay-to-scale-ai-driven-hiring-across-india%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F12%2FCloudhire-banner.png&description=US-based%20CloudHire%20partners%20with%20Razorpay%20to%20scale%20AI-driven%20hiring%20across%20India "Pinterest") ![Image 4](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/432f8f6bb00bef1541375157d3b7085d9adcf37a2eb2ce06803609fb94baa0c3?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Neelima Patel](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/neelima-pradeep-patel/ "Posts by Neelima Patel") Neelima is a content writer with over 4 years of experience in the field. Introducing the Razorpay MoneySaver Export Account Dashboard: Built for Exporters, Designed for Confidence [December 3, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/introducing-the-razorpay-exporters-dashboard/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: Our new dashboard for exporters](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Moneysaver-Blog-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Moneysaver-Blog.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-exporters-dashboard%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-exporters-dashboard%2F&text=Introducing%20the%20Razorpay%20MoneySaver%20Export%20Account%20Dashboard%3A%20Built%20for%20Exporters%2C%20Designed%20for%20Confidence "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-exporters-dashboard%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Introducing%20the%20Razorpay%20MoneySaver%20Export%20Account%20Dashboard%3A%20Built%20for%20Exporters%2C%20Designed%20for%20Confidence&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-exporters-dashboard%2F "Email") If you’re an exporter, you know how nerve-wracking it can be to wait for an international payment to land. You check your bank account. Then your dashboard. Then your inbox, hoping for some sign that the funds are on their way. That uncertainty is exactly what the new **Razorpay MoneySaver Exporter Dashboard** aims to solve. Built specially for exporters, freelancers, and global businesses, it gives you complete clarity on every step of your payment journey, from the moment your customer sends the money, all the way until it reaches your account. Think of it as your control centre for global growth: * See how much you’re saving compared to banks and other platforms * Track incoming payments live * Upload invoices with one click * Guides to link to e-commerce and freelancer marketplaces This isn’t just an upgrade. It’s a redesigned experience built around how exporters actually work. ## **Why We Built Our New Exporter Dashboard** Exporters have so far managed their global transactions on our unified merchant dashboard. It was dependable, but we knew they needed more: a dashboard designed around the realities of cross-border business. For example, tracking an international payment isn’t like tracking a domestic one. It often passes through intermediary banks, carries different reference numbers, and can take days to reconcile. Add to that the complexity of invoices and compliance documents, and exporters were spending more time managing operations than growing their business. So we asked ourselves a simple question: “What would a dashboard look like if it truly understood exporters?” The result is the **new MoneySaver Exporter Dashboard**, built to make international payments as effortless as domestic ones. ## **What’s New for Razorpay Exporters** The new dashboard offers a completely redesigned first-time and repeat user experience, tailored to the way you export. Here’s what’s new: #### **🌍 Dedicated International Bank Accounts Page** ![Image 3: All accounts](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Screenshot-2025-12-03-at-12.54.43-PM.png)Access all your global account details in one place and share them instantly with clients. #### **📊 Savings Calculator ![Image 4: Savings calculator for exporters](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/image-50.png)** See exactly how much you save versus traditional banks and other fintech platforms, on every payment. #### **🧾 Uploading Invoices** ![Image 5: Exporters can upload invoices here](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/image-52.png) Upload invoices with one click, right from your dashboard. #### **⚙️ Platform Integration Guides** ![Image 6: Linking accounts for exporters](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/image-9-1-scaled.png)Step-by-step setup for platforms like Amazon Global Selling, Upwork, and Fiverr, so

you can start collecting faster. ## **The Impact: What It Means for Exporters** Every new feature in the MoneySaver Dashboard is built to make your global collections **simpler, faster, and more transparent**. Here’s what it means for you: ✅ **Stay in control of your payments******Track every international transaction in real time, from when your buyer initiates it to when it lands in your account. Every milestone, fully visible. ✅ **Save more with every transfer******The built-in savings calculator shows exactly how much you retain compared to banks and other providers, no hidden charges, no FX surprises. ✅ **Focus on growing globally******Whether you sell through Amazon, Upwork, or your own site, manage payments, invoices, and integrations, all inside one dashboard. ## **Built for Borderless Business** The new MoneySaver Exporter Dashboard is more than a redesign, it’s a re-imagination of how exporters experience payments. If you’re already a Razorpay MoneySaver Export Account merchant, your new dashboard is waiting for you. ## Explore Your New Razorpay Exporter Dashboard [Visit Dashboard](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/app/money-saver) If not, it takes just 10 minutes to get started. Introducing the Razorpay Node for n8n: AI-powered payments for every builder [December 4, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/introducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: Razorpay n8n Node Launch](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Razorpay-n8n-Node-Launch-1024x536.webp)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Razorpay-n8n-Node-Launch.webp) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F&text=Introducing%20the%20Razorpay%20Node%20for%20n8n%3A%20AI-powered%20payments%20for%20every%20builder "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Introducing%20the%20Razorpay%20Node%20for%20n8n%3A%20AI-powered%20payments%20for%20every%20builder&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F "Email") In a world where anyone can build with AI and no-code, payments too can now be automated as easily as drag & drop. Every day, small businesses, founders, and creators are building incredible things — automations that manage orders, route leads, and talk to customers. But when it comes to connecting those workflows to payments, most builders hit a wall. That ends today. ### **Meet the Razorpay Node for n8n** We’re excited to announce the launch of the **Razorpay Node for n8n**, a collaboration that makes it effortless for anyone — from developers to non-developers — to **monetise their workflows** without writing a single line of code. With this integration, you can now embed Razorpay’s powerful payment capabilities directly inside n8n’s visual automation builder — bringing payments, confirmations, and reconciliation into your existing flows in minutes. You can access upto 12+ operations with the Razorpay Node for n8n such as payment links, refunds, settlements and more! And 28+ operations with our model-context protocol. ### **Why this matters** Automation has redefined how businesses operate. From chatbots that take orders to CRMs that nurture leads, workflows now power the backbone of growth. But monetisation has often required developer time, backend APIs, and complex integrations. The **Razorpay Node for n8n** changes that — giving you the ability to collect, confirm, and track payments _as part of your automation_, not outside it. Whether you’re running a home business, a D2C brand, or scaling a SaaS — now, your ideas can monetise themselves. **What you can build** With the Razorpay Node, you can create end-to-end monetisation flows — visually and intuitively. Some popular use cases include: * **Chat-to-Order Workflows****** Automate order collection over WhatsApp or Telegram and generate Razorpay payment links instantly. * **Payment Insights Automations******Automate real-time payment tracking. Build a bot that gives you revenue updates, subscription stats, or refund status instantly. * **CRM and Dashboard Integrations****** Sync payments with Google Sheets, Notion, or Slack to monitor performance in real time. * **Reconciliation and Reporting****** Automate settlements, refunds, and reports to keep your books up-to-date — without manual effort. From chat to checkout to confirmation — it all just flows. ### **How it works** The Razorpay Node plugs directly into n8n’s drag-and-drop builder. [Start building from here](https://n8n.io/integrations/razorpay/). Here’s how it works: 1. **Authenticate** securely using your Razorpay API credentials. 2. **Choose from multiple operations** like: * Create Payment Link * Fetch Payment Details *

Capture or Refund Payment 3. **Connect seamlessly** with 400+ other apps on n8n — like WhatsApp, Slack, or Google Sheets. ### **Why Razorpay x n8n** Both **Razorpay** and **n8n** share a common goal: empowering builders. n8n gives you the freedom to automate anything. Razorpay gives you the infrastructure to monetise everything. Together, we’re helping businesses of all sizes move faster — enabling founders, teams, and entrepreneurs to turn automation into action, and action into revenue. **“Every business deserves the ability to monetise at the speed of their ideas. With the Razorpay Node for n8n, we’re putting that power directly into the hands of the builder.”************—****_Khilan Haria, Chief Product Officer, Razorpay_** **The future of building is open** This launch is a step toward **democratising monetisation** for every builder. We’re continuing to work with the n8n and developer community to expand capabilities — unlocking more use cases, endpoints, and intelligent automations. If you can build it, you can now monetise it. All inside your workflow. **The Razorpay Node for n8n. AI-powered payments for every builder.** Want to register for a bootcamp or have a request? [Register here!](https://razorpay.typeform.com/to/FW5WH21z#source=blog) [ai powered payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/tag/ai-powered-payments/)[Razorpay node](https://razorpay.com/blog/tag/razorpay-node/) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F&text=Introducing%20the%20Razorpay%20Node%20for%20n8n%3A%20AI-powered%20payments%20for%20every%20builder "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fintroducing-the-razorpay-node-for-n8n-ai-powered-payments-for-every-builder%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F12%2FRazorpay-n8n-Node-Launch.webp&description=Introducing%20the%20Razorpay%20Node%20for%20n8n%3A%20AI-powered%20payments%20for%20every%20builder "Pinterest") ![Image 3](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/432f8f6bb00bef1541375157d3b7085d9adcf37a2eb2ce06803609fb94baa0c3?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Neelima Patel](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/neelima-pradeep-patel/ "Posts by Neelima Patel") Neelima is a content writer with over 4 years of experience in the field. Powering Education with Seamless Payments: Razorpay Partners with Next Education [December 2, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/powering-education-with-seamless-payments-razorpay-partners-with-next-education/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: Powering Education with Seamless Payments: Razorpay Partners with Next Education](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Gemini_Generated_Image_5u6qve5u6qve5u6q-1024x565.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Gemini_Generated_Image_5u6qve5u6qve5u6q-scaled.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fpowering-education-with-seamless-payments-razorpay-partners-with-next-education%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fpowering-education-with-seamless-payments-razorpay-partners-with-next-education%2F&text=Powering%20Education%20with%20Seamless%20Payments%3A%20Razorpay%20Partners%20with%20Next%20Education "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fpowering-education-with-seamless-payments-razorpay-partners-with-next-education%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Powering%20Education%20with%20Seamless%20Payments%3A%20Razorpay%20Partners%20with%20Next%20Education&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fpowering-education-with-seamless-payments-razorpay-partners-with-next-education%2F "Email") Be it preschools, schools, an academy, or independent online tutoring, managing an educational institute is no small task. From academics to administration, they juggle multiple responsibilities every day. But for many, the **admission process**, **fee collection, and reconciliation remain some of the most time-consuming and error-prone processes**. That’s exactly where **Next Education** is making a difference. As one of India’s leading EdTech providers, Next Education offers its cloud-first, AI-driven, digital operating system – NextOS. Built around a user-friendly, next-gen ERP, NextOS automates everything from fee collection to report generation and seamlessly integrates with a full suite of EdTech tools like attendance management, digital learning modules, holistic report cards, and proprietary publications. Their mission is simple: empower educational institutes to focus more on students and less on administrative hassles. ## **The Challenge: Fee Collections Were a Bottleneck** Traditionally, fee management required significant manual effort. Staff needed to track transactions, reconcile records, and manage discrepancies. This not only drained resources but also created friction for parents who had limited payment options. While Next Education’s NextOS (ERP) digitised much of this process, the **quality of the payments experience depended heavily on the payment platform powering it.** And that’s where Razorpay stepped in. ## **The Razorpay Advantage** Today, over **100+ schools using NextOS rely on Razorpay** to power their fee collections. Educational institutes prefer Razorpay because of a number of reasons such as: * **Smooth, high-success transactions**: Unlike other gateways that face frequent failures, Razorpay delivers reliability and speed. * **Quick issue resolution**: Escalations are addressed promptly, building confidence for both institutes and parents. * **Flexible payment options**: Parents can pay via UPI, cards, net banking, and wallets, ensuring accessibility for everyone. * **Real-time reconciliation**: Institutes’ admins can track and manage payments in one dashboard without manual errors.![Image 3](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Gemini_Generated_Image_ekt5kwekt5kwekt5-scaled.png) ## **The Results: Simpler Operations, Happier Parents**![Image 4](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Screenshot-2025-11-27-at-4.03.54-PM.png) * **9 million** transactions processed, that’s how NextOS has streamlined the school’s fee collection. * **89%** of educators say they save **5–10 hours every week** with NextOS. * **85%** of education professionals believe NextOS is **10x better** than any other academic or administrative platform. ## **Looking Ahead: Scaling Together** Next Education continues to expand its footprint across India, with Razorpay powering payments for schools of every size, from standalone institutions to large educational groups. Together, **the partnership ensures that****payments never become a barrier to learning or growth.** Are you an ERP or

EdTech solution provider? Partner with Razorpay to give your clients the seamless payment experience they deserve. How Razorpay Transformed RajiRamniq’s International Payments and Crafted a Global Growth Story [September 19, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/rajiramniqs-international-payments-case-study/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: International Payments](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/Rajiramniq-2-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/Rajiramniq-2.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frajiramniqs-international-payments-case-study%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frajiramniqs-international-payments-case-study%2F&text=How%20Razorpay%20Transformed%20RajiRamniq%27s%20International%20Payments%20and%20Crafted%20a%20Global%20Growth%20Story "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frajiramniqs-international-payments-case-study%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=How%20Razorpay%20Transformed%20RajiRamniq%27s%20International%20Payments%20and%20Crafted%20a%20Global%20Growth%20Story&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frajiramniqs-international-payments-case-study%2F "Email") RajiRamniq is a fashion label that seamlessly blends India’s rich cultural heritage with contemporary style. Founded by sisters Raji and Ramniq, the brand specializes in handcrafted ethnic wear that appeals to the modern fashion seeker, offering a unique mix of tradition and innovation. ## **From a Dream to a Design Destination** In 2012, sisters Raji and Ramniq embarked on a journey to create a brand that would resonate with the evolving tastes of today’s fashion-conscious consumers. With Raji’s technical expertise from NIFT and Ramniq’s design flair from NIFD, they started small, with just a few tailoring machines. Today, RajiRamniq has grown into a renowned label, beloved by celebrities and customers alike for its unique, handcrafted creations. [Read more about the RajiRamniq story](https://rajiramniq.com/about-us/?gclid=Cj0KCQjw0Oq2BhCCARIsAA5hubUFHF1ARj5-GY-2PXwoCv41idzZfgXL4J1pYx0TfvkvQIbVTR3z8eoaAkc9EALw_wcB) ## **Stitches in Time: Meeting Modern Challenges with Razorpay International Payments** As RajiRamniq grew, so did the challenges of managing payments, particularly for **international transactions**. Initially, the brand faced issues with its [payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/), which led to high rates of **[cart abandonment](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-abandoned-cart/) and payment failures**, especially with international customers. A challenge arose when a customer canceled an order via an international payment gateway after the transaction had been processed, leading to some confusion and delays. Additionally, their initial experience with a leading bank presented several obstacles, prompting them to search for a more reliable solution. With their order volumes spiking during peak seasons like Diwali, and an increasing number of international customers, RajiRamniq needed a payment gateway that could handle high transaction volumes smoothly and efficiently. ## **Weaving Success: The Razorpay Transformation** RajiRamniq turned to Razorpay to address their payment challenges. After switching from the leading bank to Razorpay, the brand immediately noticed improvements. Razorpay’s payment gateway **streamlined RajiRamniq’s international transactions**, ensuring smooth [payment processing](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-payment-processing/) and cutting conversion times to just three days. This marked a significant improvement from previous delays caused by security concerns. Complementing this, **Razorpay’s [POS](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-pos-terminal/)** terminals delivered exceptional performance, while their technical support team resolved any issues swiftly. Additionally,**Razorpay Magic Checkout** transformed the checkout process, reducing friction and enhancing the overall customer experience. ## **The Fabric of Future Growth** The switch to Razorpay brought about a remarkable transformation in RajiRamniq’s operations. The brand now enjoys a high **success rate**on international payments. This particularly comes to the fore during peak periods. This last Diwali season, Rajiramniq saw a 3x spike in order volumes and Razorpay enabled the brand to handle this surge with ease. The seamless performance of Razorpay’s payment

gateway, coupled with the positive experiences of its customers, has positioned RajiRamniq for further growth, particularly in international markets such as the **US, UK, Canada, Australia, and Saudi Arabia**. ![Image 3](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2024/09/Rajiramniq-3-1024x512.png) ## **Setting the Stage for Future Success** RajiRamniq’s partnership with Razorpay has been a game-changer, allowing the brand to overcome its initial payment challenges and scale its operations both domestically and internationally. With Razorpay’s advanced features and reliable support, RajiRamniq is well-equipped to continue its journey of blending traditional Indian craftsmanship with modern design, while expanding its footprint across new markets. How House of Masaba is Redefining Fashion with Bold, Vibrant Designs, Powered by Razorpay [May 5, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/house-of-masaba-and-razorpay/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: House of Masaba and Razorpay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-Banner-1-Masaba-1024x536.jpg)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-Banner-1-Masaba.jpg) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F&text=How%20House%20of%20Masaba%20is%20Redefining%20Fashion%20with%20Bold%2C%20Vibrant%20Designs%2C%20Powered%20by%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=How%20House%20of%20Masaba%20is%20Redefining%20Fashion%20with%20Bold%2C%20Vibrant%20Designs%2C%20Powered%20by%20Razorpay&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F "Email") _**Masaba Gupta’s vision is clear**_ > _**I’m reimagining your wardrobe – global but fearlessly Indian.**_ When she founded House of Masaba in 2009, she had no idea that her creative journey would evolve into one of India’s most dynamic and beloved fashion brands. With a distinct design language that combines bold, vibrant prints with unconventional silhouettes, House of Masaba quickly became the go-to brand for young, fashion-forward women in India and across the globe. The brand’s pieces are more than just clothing; they are a reflection of Masaba’s journey, her mixed heritage, and her bold vision to create a brand that speaks to the global woman, while always staying grounded in her Indian roots. Masaba herself never envisioned a career in fashion. In fact, she admits that becoming a designer wasn’t her first choice. But life had a different plan for her. Her creative flair, combined with a deep understanding of commerce and market dynamics, propelled her to create a brand that would soon become a household name. Today, House of Masaba is not just a fashion label, but a symbol of empowerment and creativity. The brand is known for breaking boundaries, whether it’s through collaborations with international names like HBO’s _Game of Thrones_ or by being one of the first designers in India to host digital fashion shows on Instagram. With major collaborations with brands like Maybelline, Samsung, and Levi’s, House of Masaba continues to expand its reach and appeal. ## **Empowering House of Masaba’s Global Journey, Powered by Razorpay** As House of Masaba takes India’s bold, vibrant fashion to the world, [Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/) has played a pivotal role in ensuring that global customers can shop seamlessly from anywhere. With Razorpay’s [International Payment Gatway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) suite, House of Masaba has expanded its reach to 87 countries, bringing their unique, proudly-Indian creations to an even wider audience. Key Highlights: * 5% increase in international payment success rates in 2025 compared to the 2024 average, ensuring smoother transactions for global customers. * Accepted payments from 87 countries, allowing the brand to cater to international customers effortlessly. With Razorpay’s robust and reliable payment infrastructure, the brand can now offer its customers across the globe an uninterrupted shopping experience, whether they’re purchasing for a special occasion or simply treating themselves to the latest collections. ## **The Journey Forward** With a strong digital-first approach, House of Masaba continues to

redefine the fashion landscape, making waves both in India and globally. As the brand continues to push boundaries, expand its reach, and celebrate India’s spirit through innovative designs, Razorpay remains a trusted partner in their journey. We’re happy to be supporting the brand as they continue to grow, helping them do what they do best – revolutionizing fashion, one fearless design at a time. **_Find out how we’re backing India’s boldest disruptors_**[![Image 3: CTA - Backing India's Boldest](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-banner.png)](https://razorpay.com/m/bold/?utm_source=google&utm_medium=blog-CTA&utm_campaign=founder-articles) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F&text=How%20House%20of%20Masaba%20is%20Redefining%20Fashion%20with%20Bold%2C%20Vibrant%20Designs%2C%20Powered%20by%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fhouse-of-masaba-and-razorpay%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F05%2FBlog-Banner-1-Masaba.jpg&description=How%20House%20of%20Masaba%20is%20Redefining%20Fashion%20with%20Bold%2C%20Vibrant%20Designs%2C%20Powered%20by%20Razorpay "Pinterest") ![Image 4](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/ee5a53049f2dabfd6ee682311fb9e90d708e6c4ead903b315e53dfa5a96dafc0?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Razorpay Marketing Team](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/razorpay-marketing-team/ "Posts by Razorpay Marketing Team") The Razorpay Marketing Team is a passionate group of storytellers, strategists, and creators driving the brand’s vision to empower India’s boldest builders. # Turnover of Over Rs 50 Crore? You Now Need to Accept Payments Using RuPay & UPI - Razorpay Payment Gateway [![Image 1: Razorpay Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2020/06/Logo.svg)](https://razorpay.com/ "Razorpay Blog") * [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) * [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) * [Exclusive](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/exclusive/) * [Forex](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/forex/) * [Online Commerce](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/online-commerce/) * [Payroll](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payroll/) * [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) * [Inspiration Brew](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/inspiration-brew/) * [Policies with Dr. Poli](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/policies-with-dr-poli/) [Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog) » [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) » Turnover of Over Rs 50 Crore? You Now Need to Accept Payments Using RuPay & UPI In[Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) # Turnover of Over Rs 50 Crore? You Now Need to Accept Payments Using RuPay & UPI [January 23, 2020](https://razorpay.com/blog/cbdt-notification-50-crore-upi-rupay/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: Payments Using RuPay & UPI](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/50-Cr-Revenue-need-UPI-1024x512.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/50-Cr-Revenue-need-UPI.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fcbdt-notification-50-crore-upi-rupay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fcbdt-notification-50-crore-upi-rupay%2F&text=Turnover%20of%20Over%20Rs%2050%20Crore%3F%20You%20Now%20Need%20to%20Accept%20Payments%20Using%20RuPay%20%26%20UPI "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fcbdt-notification-50-crore-upi-rupay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Turnover%20of%20Over%20Rs%2050%20Crore%3F%20You%20Now%20Need%20to%20Accept%20Payments%20Using%20RuPay%20%26%20UPI&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fcbdt-notification-50-crore-upi-rupay%2F "Email") The Indian government’s push for a digital economy is very much real. In the past couple of years, we have seen numerous endeavours from the government to drive the adoption of digital payments. The recent removal of [MDR charges](https://razorpay.com/blog/merchant-discount-rate-mdr/) on transactions done using UPI and RuPay is a case in point. Coming on the heels of this move, the Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) released a notification under Section 269SU that aims to increase the use of UPI and RuPay for business-to-business (B2B) payments. And why not? [UPI has grown by leaps and bounds](https://razorpay.com/blog/upi-2019-transactions-data/) in the consumer payments space. Google Pay, PhonePe are now common household names and synonymous with P2P money transfers. It makes sense that the convenience and speed of UPI payments be utilized by businesses as well. Hence, as per the government’s latest notification, businesses with gross receipts of more than Rs 50 crore need to provide the facility to their customers of making payments through UPI, UPI QR codes and RuPay debit cards. Here’s the circular for your reference. [![Image 3](http://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/cbdt-notification.png)](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/) _Source:_[_IncometaxIndia.gov.in_](https://www.incometaxindia.gov.in/communications/notification/notification_105_2019.pdf) > This notification under Section 269SU came out from the Central Board of Direct Taxes on 30th December 2019. It set the deadline of 31st January 2020 for businesses to install this facility into their systems. The penalty for not meeting this deadline has been set as a fine of Rs 5,000 per day from 1st February 2020 onwards. The nitty-gritty of the notification is that the rule has to be followed by businesses where the turnover exceeds Rs 50 crore in the immediately preceding fiscal year. Besides any [electronic payment modes](https://razorpay.com/blog/electronic-payment-system/) you may already have, every applicable business needs to mandatorily also support: * Debit card powered by RuPay * Unified Payments Interface (UPI) (BHIM-UPI) * Unified Payments Interface Quick Response Code (UPI QR Code) (BHIM-UPI QR Code) UPI and RuPay are both properties of the [National Payments Corporation of India](https://razorpay.com/learn/national-payments-corporation-of-india-services/) (NPCI). Apart from promoting digital payments within the country, the government also aims to increase the adoption of state-sponsored payment infrastructure through the adoption of UPI and RuPay. As mentioned earlier, UPI has seen immense rise in usage all through 2019. It contributed to 37.7% of all digital payments through 2019 on the Razorpay platform. While most of this contribution came from the B2C

space, we believe that UPI has great usability in the B2B space as well. ## How to accept B2B payments in UPI and RuPay Coming back to the CBDT notification, with the 31st January deadline looming, the best way for businesses to fulfill the notification would be by integrating with a payment platform like Razorpay. A payment gateway is a system that is designed to handle end-to-end payments. A payment gateway, when integrated with a business’s website or app, allows the business to accept domestic as well as [international payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/)through all electronic modes. This includes netbanking, credit cards, debit cards and the notification’s requirements of UPI and RuPay. The best part about the Razorpay Payment Gateway is the ease of integration. With well-documented SDKs, RESTful APIs and support for popular plugins, getting onboard with Razorpay Payment Gateway will be a breeze to help your business meet the government’s deadline. ### Features of [Razorpay – Best Payment Gateway in India](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/): * Quick onboarding and integration * Developer-friendly APIs and plugins * PCI-DSS Level 1 security * Support for all payment modes The other options that your business can explore are Razorpay Payment Pages and Razorpay Payment Links. Payment Pages allows you to build a custom-branded page to showcase your brand, products and services, and accept payments on the go. ### Features of [Razorpay Payment Pages](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/): * No coding required * Go live in minutes * Meet your brand guidelines * Create a memorable URL [![Image 4: razorpay payment pages](http://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/razorpay-payment-pages-1024x539.jpg)](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/) With Payment Links, your business can send individual links to customers through email, SMS, chatbots and messengers. The recipient has to just click on the link to make the payment. ### Features of [Razorpay Payment Links](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/): * Customise to your brand guidelines * No coding required * Automate through powerful APIs * Get started instantly [![Image 5: razorpay payment links](http://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/razorpay-payment-links-1024x536.jpg)](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) Both Payment Pages and Payment Links support all payment modes, including the ones stipulated in the notification, that are supported by our Payment Gateway. If integrating with the Payment Gateway would be difficult before 31st January, then the best bet for your business would be to set up a Payment Page and fulfill the government’s ask in a matter of minutes. The CBDT notification under rule 119AA has come into force under the Income Tax Act from 1st January 2020. If your business exceeds the turnover of Rs 50 crore, you should get the facility to accept UPI and RuPay payments right away. Write to us at [enterprise@razorpay.com](mailto:enterprise@razorpay.com) to expedite the process through our banking partners. Beauty Without Borders: Nish Hair Goes Global with Razorpay [May 7, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/nish-hair-and-razorpay/)2 Mins Read [![Image 2: Nish Hair and Razorpay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-Banner-15-Nish-1024x536.jpg)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-Banner-15-Nish.jpg) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F&text=Beauty%20Without%20Borders%3A%20Nish%20Hair%20Goes%20Global%20with%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Beauty%20Without%20Borders%3A%20Nish%20Hair%20Goes%20Global%20with%20Razorpay&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F "Email") > _I’m not just making hair, I’m making confidence you can wear_ _**— Parul Gulati, Founder, Nish Hair**_ It started with a single clip-in—and a dream big enough to change how women see themselves. When Parul Gulati founded Nish Hair in 2017, she wasn’t just selling hair extensions; she was building a movement. A movement that said _you deserve to feel beautiful, strong, and unstoppable, every single day_. No more bad hair days. No more compromises. Just limitless confidence, one strand at a time. Born out of pure love—for hair, for craftsmanship, for self-belief—Nish Hair became a pioneer in DIY extensions and clip-in toppers in India. But what made them truly special wasn’t just the product; it was the promise: _dream-worthy hair for every woman who dared to dream._ Today, Nish Hair has grown from a handful of clients to a global sisterhood, proving that when beauty meets empowerment, there are no borders it can’t cross. ## **Making Good Hair Days Global with Razorpay** To truly spread the joy of “no bad hair days” across the world, Nish Hair needed a trusted partner who could keep up with their growing global dreams. That’s when [**Razorpay**](https://razorpay.com/) turned aspirations into accessible reality. With Razorpay’s[International Payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/), Nish Hair unlocked the ability to accept payments from customers worldwide — easily, securely, and without friction. Women from New York to New Delhi, London to Dubai, could now shop for their perfect hair match without any checkout hurdles. Payments became smoother, shopping became faster, and most importantly, dreams became more reachable. Together, we’re making good hair days truly global. ## **The Confidence to Go Global** From one woman’s vision to a worldwide movement, Nish Hair’s journey proves that when purpose meets the right partner, magic happens. With Razorpay by their side, they didn’t just scale—they soared. And as their global sisterhood grows stronger every day, one thing’s certain: bad hair days don’t stand a chance. _**We are backing India’s boldest. Take a look at how we are making it happen with other brands.**_ [![Image 3: CTA - Backing India's Boldest](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-banner.png)](https://razorpay.com/m/bold/?utm_source=google&utm_medium=blog-CTA&utm_campaign=founder-articles) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F&text=Beauty%20Without%20Borders%3A%20Nish%20Hair%20Goes%20Global%20with%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fnish-hair-and-razorpay%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F05%2FBlog-Banner-15-Nish.jpg&description=Beauty%20Without%20Borders%3A%20Nish%20Hair%20Goes%20Global%20with%20Razorpay "Pinterest") ![Image 4](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/ee5a53049f2dabfd6ee682311fb9e90d708e6c4ead903b315e53dfa5a96dafc0?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Razorpay Marketing Team](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/razorpay-marketing-team/ "Posts by Razorpay Marketing Team") The Razorpay Marketing Team is a passionate group of storytellers, strategists, and creators driving the brand’s vision to empower India’s boldest builders. In[Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) # Accept payments easily from Australia with Razorpay! [May 26, 2022](https://razorpay.com/blog/accept-payments-easily-from-australia-with-razorpay/)6 Mins Read [![Image 2: Accept payments easily from Australia with Razorpay!](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/Frame-7-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/Frame-7.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-payments-easily-from-australia-with-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-payments-easily-from-australia-with-razorpay%2F&text=Accept%20payments%20easily%20from%20Australia%20with%20Razorpay%21 "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-payments-easily-from-australia-with-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Accept%20payments%20easily%20from%20Australia%20with%20Razorpay%21&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-payments-easily-from-australia-with-razorpay%2F "Email") For Indian exporters, Australia has been a promising market showing a [doubling in merchandise trade](https://www.businessworld.in/article/India-Australia-Merchandise-Trade-More-Than-Doubles-India-EXIM-Bank-MD/08-04-2022-425003/) (8th April 2022 – _Businessworld.in_) from $10.7Bn in 2020 to nearly $23Bn in 2021. With strong trade links, an active and wealthy Indian diaspora, and strong tailwinds behind cross-border exports, there is an enormous opportunity for Indian businesses looking to expand their market presence in Australia. In the past, accepting payments from Australia-based customers meant relying almost exclusively on the use of credit card payments. Recent Data from the Reserve bank of Australia, however, shows that credit card usage has been on the decline since 2018. In 2021, credit card usage declined by 3.1%. On the other hand, Newer Online Payment Methods that enable direct bank transfers have grown multifold in the past 3 years. Indian businesses have struggled to provide such online payment options and instruments to Australian customers. ![Image 3: Credit cards on issue in Australia (in thousands) ](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2022/05/Screenshot-2022-05-26-at-11.20.50-AM-1024x565.png) Credit cards on issue in Australia (in thousands) _**Source:** Reserve Bank of Australia Data_ To solve this problem, Razorpay has partnered with POLi. POLi is a trusted Australian and New Zealand payments network, which enables its customers down under to make payments directly from their bank accounts without needing to use credit or debit cards. With our new POLi integration, Razorpay customers will be able to accept payments from customers across Australia and New Zealand seamlessly. ## What is POLi? POLi is Australia’s leading real-time online debit payment method. It offers its users the ability to pay from their internet banking directly, offering a secure alternative to traditional payment methods such as cards and digital wallets such as PayPal. POLi counts major businesses such as Jetstar, Virgin Australia, Air New Zealand, and Sportsbet as its customers. The company POLi Payments is a fully-owned business of Australia Post. POLi has integrated with 23 banks in ANZ and potentially covers ~95% of Australians and New Zealanders. Over 40% of Australians do not have access to credit cards while a vast majority have access to Netbanking. Businesses thus prefer accepting payments via POLi as it gives them significant access to customers who prefer to debit funds for purchases. Also, as opposed to cards, all transactions via POLi are processed only once the end customer has used dual-factor [authentication](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-authentication/). There are thus, no [card network](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-a-card-network/)-driven chargebacks or forced refunds via this method, and disputes are handled directly between end-customers and businesses. Related Read: [What are the Different

Types of Digital Wallets?](https://razorpay.com/learn/types-of-digital-wallets/) ## **How does POLi work?** POLi works by connecting customers at an e-commerce checkout with their internet banking. POLi’s software enables customers to log in to their internet banking seamlessly during checkout and pre-populates the payment details, making the transaction smooth and reducing customer [abandonment](https://razorpay.com/blog/cart-abandonment-challenge-how-to-solve-it/) and payments friction at checkout. Since the transaction leverages their own internet banking account, they also have the reassurance that their payments and information are secured. ![Image 4](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2022/05/Frame-9-1024x343.png) **End-Customer Payment Flow with POLi:** * The end-customer chooses POLi as a payment method on their Razorpay checkout * They get redirected to the POLi website and are asked to choose their bank * Customers will then securely log in to their bank using their credentials * The payment gets completed if credentials match and the transaction is confirmed by the customer ## **What are bank transfers?** Earlier, routing money directly from your bank account was difficult and involved considerable effort. However, with the digitisation of money transfers, internet banking, and bank transfers have gained in popularity and have begun to overshadow credit and debit cards as [methods of payment](https://razorpay.com/blog/different-types-of-payment-methods/). The growth and popularity of [UPI in India](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-upi-and-how-it-works/), Trustly in Europe, and POLi in Australia is a testament to the changing nature of customer behaviour. POLi essentially bridges the gap between business checkouts and internet banking interfaces for customers. By enabling paying customers to leverage their internet banking to complete [e-commerce transactions](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-ecom-transaction/), POLi makes it easier for customers to pay and trust the payment. Further, internet banking reduces the logistical hassle of matching incoming payments with orders, making it substantially easier for exporters to get started on fulfilment and not waste time on manual tracking and [reconciliation](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-reconciliation/) of payments to discover orders. ## **No Australian account or legal entity needed!** International transactions and exports usually come with large amounts of painful paperwork, which is a source of unnecessary friction and frustration for Indian businesses. With Razorpay and POLi’s partnership, you will be able to access the POLi payment method without any extra paperwork or compliance. No foreign bank accounts will be necessary to accept payments from Australia and New Zealand – payments via POLi will be routed to your account via Razorpay from your customer’s bank accounts. ## **Benefits of POLi for your business** _“Now sell to millions of Australian and New Zealander customers who don’t use credit cards with POLi and Razorpay!”_ ![Image 5](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2022/05/Frame-10-1024x343.png) * **Sell in Australia and New Zealand with ease** Enter and sell to markets and consumers with low credit card penetration and use the latest online methods and instruments to collect payments * **No chargebacks!** Avoid painful unnecessary chargebacks from card networks with an authorized bank transfer * **Strong coverage******POLi enables users from 23 of the region’s biggest banks – 16 top banks from Australia and 7 top New Zealand banks – to make payments seamlessly * **Higher order value******With higher limits and greater customer ease of paying directly through their accounts, watch your average sale to customers

from the region rise! * **Safer than credit cards******With no chargebacks (unlike credit and debit card payments), this is safer for your business; and with bank account authorizations, safer for your customers too! ## **What’s next?** After adding [Trustly](https://razorpay.com/blog/exporting-to-europe-just-became-easier-with-razorpay/) and now POLi to its checkout, Razorpay is working to make it easier for Indian businesses to essay their global growth story. We are now focusing on enabling other under-served market segments – such as B2B exporters, adding new payment methods to make accepting international payments easier for Indian MSMEs, and making international payments safer through rigorous, technology-driven risk checks. If you are looking for new international markets to take your business to the next, global, level – consider Razorpay’s [International payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/)! If you are an existing Razorpay user, check your dashboard for easy enablement of international transactions. # A winning Tally: Announcing the new Razorpay – TallyPrime integration - Razorpay Blog [![Image 1: Razorpay Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2020/06/Logo.svg)](https://razorpay.com/ "Razorpay Blog") * [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) * [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) * [Exclusive](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/exclusive/) * [Forex](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/forex/) * [Online Commerce](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/online-commerce/) * [Payroll](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payroll/) * [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) * [Inspiration Brew](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/inspiration-brew/) * [Policies with Dr. Poli](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/policies-with-dr-poli/) [Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog) » [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) » A winning Tally: Announcing the new Razorpay – TallyPrime integration In[Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) # A winning Tally: Announcing the new Razorpay – TallyPrime integration [June 13, 2023](https://razorpay.com/blog/announcing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: TallyPrime integration](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/announcing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration-1024x502.webp)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/announcing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration.webp) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fannouncing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fannouncing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration%2F&text=A%20winning%20Tally%3A%20Announcing%20the%20new%20Razorpay%20%E2%80%93%20TallyPrime%20integration "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fannouncing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=A%20winning%20Tally%3A%20Announcing%20the%20new%20Razorpay%20%E2%80%93%20TallyPrime%20integration&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fannouncing-razorpay-tallyprime-integration%2F "Email") The benefits of d igital invoicing for businesses are well-documented. Digitization using business management software simplifies life for businesses, from managing books to compliance, from filing of [GST returns](https://razorpay.com/learn/types-gst-taxes-returns/) to [reconciliation](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-reconciliation/). Business management software like TallyPrime has always been a reliable ally for businesses looking to automate books and compliance. When it comes to invoicing, TallyPrime sets the standard with its unparalleled flexibility and super-fast [invoice](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-invoice/) creation. What if we could take this one step further? What if businesses couldn’t just raise invoices but also collect payments? ## **Introducing the Razorpay – TallyPrime integration** Well, we no longer have to wonder. Here’s launching the [Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/) integration with [TallyPrime](https://tallysolutions.com/tally-prime/). Starting this week, businesses can attach a Razorpay Payment Link/ QR code on their invoice directly from TallyPrime. ## **What is the Razorpay – TallyPrime integration all about?** Earlier a business had to rely on offline means of payment collection or go to a different platform for generating [digital payment](https://razorpay.com/learn/digital-payments-india-definition-methods-importance/) requests against each invoice. This also meant that payments had to be tracked separately and reconciliation done manually. The new integration allows Tally customers to generate Razorpay Payment Links or QR codes directly from TallyPrime and automatically add them in the invoice. These Payment Links and QR codes can also be shared via email or SMS. This solution makes it easy for TallyPrime users to send payment details and accept payments from multiple customers or vendors via Razorpay. ## **Why is Razorpay the best payment solution on TallyPrime?** Razorpay is the best payment solution on TallyPrime because it offers businesses the following benefits: 1. **Unlimited payment options** for any invoice amount: Accept payments in 100+ modes including cards, wallets, UPI, [EMI](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-emi/), Netbanking and Pay Later. 2. **Automated payment reminders**: Forget about making frustrating calls to your customers. Instead, send automated reminders to your customers for pending payments. 3. Generating **international invoices**: Enable Razorpay’s [International Payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) and reach over 30 crore customers around the world, with 20% higher transaction success rates and a faster settlement schedule. 4. **Faster and streamlined invoice payments**: Send Razorpay Payment Links/ QR codes with invoices so that customers can pay from anywhere in the world. 5. **Simplified reconciliation**: Upload the Razorpay report on TallyPrime which will update the payment statuses against each invoice. ## **How do you enable the Razorpay – TallyPrime integration?** This can be achieved by means of a one-time hassle-free setup. Link your Tally and Razorpay accounts using your

Razorpay r egistered e-mail ID or registered phone numbe r. **Step 1 (For new Razorpay users):** Register and complete your KYC with Razorpay to generate your Merchant ID. **Step 2:** Run TallyPrime Release 3.0 and select your company from the list of companies. ![Image 3: TallyPrime](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-1.png) **Step 3:**Load the Company and press F11 to go to the Company Features screen. Set ‘Yes’ to ‘Show more features’ and set ‘Yes’ to the option ‘Enable Payment Request to share payment link/QR Code’, as shown: ![Image 4: Tally Prime ](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-2.png) **Step 4:**Once the above-mentioned option is set to ‘Yes’, the Merchant Profile Creation screen appears as shown: Enter the following: 1. Name: Name of the User 2. Payment Method ([Payment Gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/)/UPI): Select Razorpay from the ‘List of [Payment Methods](https://razorpay.com/blog/different-types-of-payment-methods/)’ 3. Merchant ID: The Merchant ID of the merchant/user 4. Registered E-mail: The email ID used by the merchant during sign in ![Image 5: TallyPrime](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-3.png) **Step 5:**Accept the F11 Features screen. ![Image 6: Tally Prime ](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-4.png) The above is a one-time activity to update the merchant profile with the Razorpay integration. ## **How do you generate a Razorpay Payment Link/QR Code from Tally?** Now that the merchant profile has been updated, we can generate a payment link: 1. While recording transactions (Create/ Alter ‘Voucher’) 2. After recording a transaction for one or more transactions of single or multiple parties (customers) (From the ‘Day Book’) 3. While printing Party Ledger / Party Outstanding / Reminder Letters of a Party (From the ‘Ledger Vouchers’) Once you click on ‘[**Generate Payment Link**](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/)’ from either of the places, a tab opens with most details pre-filled. However, you can choose to update the mode of sending payment details, mobile number, email id, expiry date for payment link and remarks if any. ![Image 7: TallyPrime ](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Screenshot-2023-06-13-at-12.29.06-PM.png) Once the link generation form is accepted, an OTP screen appears if you are not logged in to your merchant profile. ![Image 8: Tally Prime ](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-6-300x112.png) Enter the OTP received on the Email ID mentioned in your merchant profile. On confirmation, you will receive the following message on the successful generation of the link. ![Image 9: Tally Prime ](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-7-new-300x287.png) The payment link gets sent to the customer by email and SMS. It can also be added to the invoice. ![Image 10: TallyPrime](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/fotor_2023-6-13_12_30_37-fotor-20230613123125.png) It can be printed on a company ledger too. ![Image 11: TallyPrime](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2023/06/Tally-9-fotor-20230613123212.png) ## **Conclusion** The Razorpay – TallyPrime integration will take your e-invoicing experience to the next level. Link Razorpay to your TallyPrime account now and make business simpler!
