# Manage Working Capital Efficiently with 100% Visibility in Settlements [![Image 1: Razorpay Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2020/06/Logo.svg)](https://razorpay.com/ "Razorpay Blog") * [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) * [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) * [Exclusive](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/exclusive/) * [Forex](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/forex/) * [Online Commerce](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/online-commerce/) * [Payroll](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payroll/) * [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) * [Inspiration Brew](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/inspiration-brew/) * [Policies with Dr. Poli](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/policies-with-dr-poli/) [Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog) » [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) » Manage Working Capital Efficiently with 100% Visibility in Settlements In[Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) # Manage Working Capital Efficiently with 100% Visibility in Settlements [February 16, 2020](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/settlements-transparency-working-capital/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: razorpay settlements](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/razorpaysettlements.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/razorpaysettlements.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fsettlements-transparency-working-capital%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fsettlements-transparency-working-capital%2F&text=Manage%20Working%20Capital%20Efficiently%20with%20100%25%20Visibility%20in%20Settlements "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fsettlements-transparency-working-capital%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Manage%20Working%20Capital%20Efficiently%20with%20100%25%20Visibility%20in%20Settlements&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fsettlements-transparency-working-capital%2F "Email") Working capital is more than just a financial metric. It is the fuel that allows companies to run their day-to-day business operations. Its management, or mismanagement, can have a very direct impact on a company’s financial health and operational success. For businesses that [accept payments online](https://razorpay.com/), working capital is a function of incoming settlements from their partner [payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/blog/payment-gateway-101). As a result, a lack of visibility in settlement timelines can end up creating a plethora of challenges for companies. Some of these include: 1. **Lack of clarity around settlement timelines**: Wondering when their payments will get processed can keep businesses worried and make it difficult for them to manage working capital efficiently 2. **Expected settlement amount**: Knowing how much they are going to be paid is a crucial piece of information for companies to plan their day-to-day operations 3. **Settlement status on the transaction page**: It is important for businesses to know which transactions have already been paid for and which are still pending 4. **International payments**: Answers to questions regarding the settlement cycle of their international payments and service fees on the same are crucial for businesses 5. **Route settlements**: Companies organized in a parent/child network or partner network should not find it very difficult to keep a track of how much each entity will be paid and by when ## Settlement UX changes To equip our merchants with the armor to handle these challenges, we’ve made the following UI/UX enhancements on the [Razorpay dashboard](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/signin): ### Transparency on upcoming settlements * The amount and date for your next settlement will now be visible on your Home page, Transactions page & Settlements page * This is the go-to metric for businesses of any size to quickly assess when their next settlement will happen and how much will they be paid ![Image 3](http://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/uxtwo-1024x380.png) ### Settlement cycle in the ‘My Account’ section * New to Razorpay and want to check what your default settlement schedule is? This information is readily available on the dashboard. No need to reach out to the support team * Want to start accepting payments with an [international payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/)? Check your international settlement schedule through your dashboard to better manage your cash flow. ![Image 4](http://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/image-1024x617.png) ### Settlement status for each and every transaction * No more confusion on which transaction you have received payment for and which is still pending * This feature also provides visibility on service fees paid to Razorpay ![Image 5](http://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/settlementuxone-1024x584.png)

The above changes will significantly enhance visibility on settlements and provide our merchants with the information they need to efficiently manage their working capital. An essential quality of a payments solution is the ability to scale to meet the growing demands for our customers. Transparency in settlements is another endeavour by us to give you the best payments infrastructure. Are you ready to simplify the way you accept online payments? Sign up on [Razorpay – top payment gateway in India](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/), if you haven’t and leave all your payment worries to us! It provides a convenient and secure way to transfer funds between parties involved in a transaction, whether it’s for goods, services, or other financial obligations. Mastering Purpose Codes with Razorpay: Streamlining International Payments [April 10, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/streamlining-purpose-codes/)5 Mins Read [![Image 2: Mastering Purpose Codes with Razorpay: Streamlining International Payments](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/purpose_codes_960.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/purpose_codes_960.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fstreamlining-purpose-codes%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fstreamlining-purpose-codes%2F&text=Mastering%20Purpose%20Codes%20with%20Razorpay%3A%20Streamlining%20International%20Payments "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fstreamlining-purpose-codes%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Mastering%20Purpose%20Codes%20with%20Razorpay%3A%20Streamlining%20International%20Payments&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fstreamlining-purpose-codes%2F "Email") In the vast landscape of global transactions, purpose codes stand as silent guards, ensuring the smooth flow of currency across borders. Within this complex system lies the essence of efficient [international payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/), where precision is paramount and compliance is king. Let’s delve into the world of purpose codes and understand their significance. **What is a Purpose Code?** A purpose code is a unique identifier issued by a country’s central bank that is necessary for the successful execution of [international payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/guide-to-international-payments/). These codes are assigned to each transaction involving foreign currency and specify the purpose for which the transaction is being made. They are issued by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) to specify the nature of foreign currency transactions. Every payment requires the assignment of a purpose code, distinguishing between import and export transactions. Export purpose codes start with ‘P’, whereas import purpose codes start with ‘S’.For Indian businesses, receiving payments from foreign customers is an inward remittance, and sending payments abroad for goods or services is an outward remittance. **Where are Purpose Codes Used?** * **Cross-Border Payments** When initiating or receiving a cross-border payment, it’s necessary to furnish a purpose code. This code aids financial institutions in accurately handling the payment and ensures adherence to global regulations. * **Trade in Goods** Customs authorities mandate a purpose code for categorizing transactions during the importation or exportation of goods. This code assists in determining tariff rates and may be utilized for statistical analysis purposes. * **Trade in Services** Transactions involving providing or receiving services across borders necessitate a purpose code for classification. This classification is pivotal for monitoring service flow and analyzing economic trends. * **Capital Transactions** Purpose codes categorize capital transactions like foreign direct investments, portfolio investments, and other capital inflows. This categorization facilitates the tracking of capital flow and identifies investment avenues. * **Personal Remittances** When transferring money to another country for personal purposes, such as supporting family members, a purpose code denotes the transaction’s nature. This is essential for monitoring remittance flow and assessing its economic ramifications. **Why are Purpose Codes Important?** For Indian businesses trading internationally, picking the right purpose code isn’t just a routine step, it’s a must-follow rule. Ignoring this can cause problems with following regulations and make transactions difficult. So, it’s crucial to understand and use purpose codes correctly. **Incorrect Purpose Codes lead to:** * **Compliance and Regulatory Issues** Incorrectly labeling transaction purposes can

violate Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) regulations and trigger reporting problems to regulatory authorities. For instance, if a transaction’s nature doesn’t match its assigned purpose code, it can lead to inaccurate reports submitted to regulators. * **Financial Errors** Misusing purpose codes in financial transactions can cause accounting, billing, or reporting mistakes. This may result in financial discrepancies, inaccurate statements, and difficulties in reconciling accounts. * **Operational Inefficiencies** Misusing purpose codes can lead to operational delays, resource misallocation, and challenges in monitoring activities. * **Transaction Failures** Selecting an incorrect purpose code can lead to transaction failures, especially with larger sums, increasing the risk of financial loss. **What are the guidelines one must follow to choose the right Purpose Code?** * **Seek Professional Advice** Engage with financial advisors or Chartered Accountants who possess expertise in regulatory compliance and international transactions. Their insights can help navigate the complexities of purpose code selection and ensure alignment with regulatory requirements. * **Verify RBI’s Purpose Code List** Consult the extensive list provided by the RBI, which includes purpose codes and their respective descriptions, to ensure the selection of the appropriate code. Alternatively, you can inquire with your bank for access to the purpose code list. * **Stay Updated** Regularly review regulatory updates and changes to purpose code lists to ensure compliance with evolving regulations. Maintain vigilance to adapt purpose code selections to any regulatory amendments promptly. **How Can Merchants Seamlessly Implement Purpose Codes with Razorpay?** ![Image 3](https://media.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYXRxNXBwdGlhdXA0d2VoOTM4OTI3N3hyZzQxdHllOHdoY3V4emg3cSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/nN4CR0NxK9d35hm7hu/source.gif) Using Purpose Codes with Razorpay is straightforward for merchants, whether new to the platform or already established users. Here’s a step-by-step guide for both new and existing merchants using Purpose Codes with Razorpay: **For New Merchants** * Log in to the Razorpay Dashboard. * Navigate to Account & Settings, then click on International Payments under Payment Methods. * Click on the Fill activation form to enable international payments. * Enter all business details as required on the International Payments activation page and click Continue. * Select the correct purpose code from the list provided on the Purpose code page and click Continue. * Enter all supporting details on the Supporting details page and click Submit details. * Await verification by the Razorpay Activation/Operations team. * Once verified, you can start accepting payments from international customers through Razorpay. **For Existing Merchants** * Log in to the Razorpay Dashboard. * Go to International Payment Settings and click on International Payment Codes. * Update your purpose code under the International Payment Codes section. * Select the appropriate Purpose Code based on your business requirements. * If necessary, provide additional details like HS or IEC codes. * Follow the provided guidelines for adding these codes accurately. * Review the information and click Confirm. * Await verification by the Razorpay Activation/Operations team. * Once verified, you can continue accepting payments from international customers through Razorpay. **Effortless Updates with Razorpay!** With Razorpay’s user-friendly interface, updating purpose codes becomes a seamless process, empowering businesses to tap into global markets with confidence. By staying informed, seeking professional

advice, and diligently following the outlined procedures, merchants can unlock the gateway to international trade and propel their businesses towards greater success. Razorpay Payment Pages Will Now Help D2C E-commerce Players Enjoy Faster Shipping with Shiprocket [March 10, 2022](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-payment-pages-ties-up-with-shiprocket/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: payment page with Shiprocket](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/blog-1-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/blog-1.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-payment-pages-ties-up-with-shiprocket%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-payment-pages-ties-up-with-shiprocket%2F&text=Razorpay%20Payment%20Pages%20Will%20Now%20Help%20D2C%20E-commerce%20Players%20Enjoy%20Faster%20Shipping%20with%20Shiprocket "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-payment-pages-ties-up-with-shiprocket%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Razorpay%20Payment%20Pages%20Will%20Now%20Help%20D2C%20E-commerce%20Players%20Enjoy%20Faster%20Shipping%20with%20Shiprocket&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-payment-pages-ties-up-with-shiprocket%2F "Email") The last decade has seen a rapid growth in e-commerce, as it helped in many industries break through a cumbersome [business model](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-a-business-model/) that involved middlemen and logistical delays. This boom owes most of its growth to business owners who realized that their outdated business model was costing them revenue, keeping them distant from their customers, and making it difficult for them to keep up with changing demands. Through latest technological innovations in online shopping, D2C brands are changing the landscape of Indian e-commerce and setting benchmarks with a new-age digital-first approach. According to an [Inc42 Plus report](https://inc42.com/reports/decoding-indias-200-bn-ecommerce-opportunity-market-landscape-report-2021/), the Indian D2C market is expected to touch $100 billion by 2025! With customers having more knowledge about online products now than ever before, D2C business owners must rise to the occasion. It is now pivotal to provide your customers with order information they can conveniently consume, helping you retain your loyal customer base and also build trust. So, to provide an excellent end-to-end shopping experience that goes beyond [digital payments](https://razorpay.com/learn/digital-payments-india-definition-methods-importance/) for your customers, Razorpay has partnered with Shiprocket, India’s first automated shipping software. Shiprocket has always made an effort to simplify and enhance the shipping and logistics processes by building a technology-backed solution that consolidates all shipping operations in one platform. ## Seamless shipping with secure payments at your fingertips As a result of this partnership, businesses can now sign up on Razorpay Payment Pages to access Shiprocket’s logistics and delivery services.Essentially, a D2C eCommerce player will now be able to accept and place orders from [Razorpay Payment Pages](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/), and also provide information on last-mile delivery of their products to make fulfilment more efficient. Suggested read: _[Build your online store with Payment Pages](https://razorpay.com/blog/payment-pages-online-store-business/)_ With a one-click integration that can be done right after you sign up on Payment Pages, you can enable an instant download of your incoming orders and process them efficiently from the Shiprocket panel. ## What’s in store for you with Shiprocket and Razorpay Payment Pages? ### Auto-sync of incoming orders You can synchronize your Razorpay Payment Pages with Shiprocket, and this will automatically pick up all incoming orders on the platform. This makes it easier for you to process orders directly from one place and helps you further simplify your order management and reduce the fulfillment time ### Accept domestic and international payments Razorpay Payment Pages is the quickest

way to accept domestic and [international payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/)with an online store. You can accept these payments with automated payment receipts and take your store online with zero coding and in no time ### Shipping with multiple carriers Shiprocket offers 17+ carrier partners and comprehensive network coverage to over 29,000 pin codes. You can choose the best carrier for every shipment and ship to every household in India. This can enable you to ship more orders in one go! ### Discounted shipping rates Shipping rates through Shiprocket start as low as Rs.19/500 g for e-commerce orders. While you ship faster, you can also save on shipping costs and increase your profit margins for the best results. Furthermore, it is free to use and there is no monthly setup fee ### Custom branded page You can use Payment Pages to build web pages with personal customizable content, ready-to-use templates, custom URLs, text and media support, and various social media sharing options. You can then share the Payment Page link with your customers and start [accepting payments](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) efficiently ## How to integrate Payment Pages with Shiprocket? ![Image 3: Payment Pages Integration with Shiprocket](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2022/03/Shiprocket.gif) Here’s how you can integrate Razorpay Payment Pages with Shiprocket You can integrate Payment Pages to Shiprocket by enabling the Shiprocket Option on your Payment Page. 1. Log in to the [Razorpay](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/signin)Dashboard and navigate to **_Payment Pages_** 2. Click the **_+ Create Payment Page_** button 3. Select a template from the list or click **_Create your Own_** 4. Choose **_Page Settings_** 5. Scroll down to the **_Create Orders_** on Shiprocket section and click **_Enable_** 6. A pop-up will appear informing you that various parameters that help gather customer information are being added to your Payment Page 7. Continue with the creation of your Payment Page Suggested read: _[How to integrate Shiprocket with Payment Pages](https://razorpay.com/docs/payments/payment-pages/plugins-add-ons/shiprocket/)_ Razorpay’s product suite continues to focus on providing online shoppers with the best payments and customer experience. Our cutting-edge APIs-driven payment solutions along with Shiprocket’s logistical expertise is a match made in heaven that’ll help e-commerce businesses grow their customer base by augmenting their overall shopping experience. **On to more customers, more revenue, and more growth!** [Get started with Razorpay Payment Pages today](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/) [payment We are at a time where almost every service is available online, in some form and parts. This has made the customer hooked on getting things done right from their favourite corner. Be it their child’s school fee payment, a freelancer’s project payment or an early age service provider startup, the first preference is online payments, always. However, setting up a payment gateway might take some time, money and investment of resources. Our latest offering, [Razorpay Payment Button](https://razorpay.com/payment-buttons/) is solving exactly for this by being a single button for all your payment needs. ## Let’s take a step back At Razorpay, we have always been working with a vision of making [digital payments](https://razorpay.com/learn/digital-payments-india-definition-methods-importance/) simpler for everyone. In all of our products, we look forward to having minimum or no integration. It does not matter if you have a website or not, you can use Razorpay to accept payments from anywhere, anytime. Razorpay’s [Payment Links](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) and [Payment Pages](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/) are go-to for anyone who does not have a website or an app running. It enables an individual or a business to accept payments through social media while creating a webstore of their own. If, however, you do have a website and want to collect payment without going through the hassle of integrating a payment gateway, a payment button is the way to go. With a single line of a code, you can add an integrated [payment gateways for India](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/) on your platform. _This sounds new, doesn’t it?_ Well, it is! Razorpay Payment Button is our latest offering and a new addition to our product suite. ## Introducing Razorpay Payment Button [bctt tweet=”With Razorpay Payment Button, everyone can accept online payments within one ecosystem, without any redirections. It requires zero coding and design efforts.” username=””]A business or an individual can simply copy a line of code and paste it wherever they would like to embed it. They can also choose to customize the button as per their requirement. The best part you ask? Well, you can get going within 5 minutes! [Read More [Introducing Razorpay Payment Button – The Easiest Way To Get Paid]](https://razorpay.com/blog/create-payment-buttons-donation-fees/) ## Types of Razorpay Payment Button While some people might find this product useful to accept donations, some might use this to sell their merchandise via their blog. Let’s understand the types of Payment Buttons and their respective use cases in

detail: ### Quick Pay Button By embedding this type of button, you can offer your customer to make quick payments for a fixed amount by their preferred online method like the card, netbanking, wallet etc. #### Use case of Quick Pay button There are several place you can use this quick button to collect payment ##### **1. Freelancers** Payment Links is one of the most commonly used products by freelancers because of it’s easy sharing functionalities. However, this brings in a couple of hops. In a general scenario, a freelancer sends a payment link via WhatsApp, Instagram or SMS and the customer pays the required amount via the link. This, at times, increases the chances of purchase abandonment in some cases. During our research, we identified the need for an on-page checkout option for freelancers and individual contributors. Basically, this meant a re-directionless experience wherein a customer can make the payment on the same window. [bctt tweet=”With the release of Razorpay Payment Button, freelancers can add multiple ‘Quick Pay’ buttons on their website and accept payments within the same ecosystem.” username=””]This offering aims to solve the following for freelancers and individual contributors: * Redirection-less payments within one ecosystem; reducing the chances of drop-offs * Enabling[international payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) for ease of business ##### 2. Coaches & consultants There have always been an expert in every field that there is. For example, there are digital marketing consultants, swimming coaches, financial consulatnt etc. A lot of these people operate work as an individual. The major belief is that a huge chunk of their work comes from word-of-mouth. While this stands true for a majority of people, just like any business, having an online presence is important for them too. While they can get started with a ready-to-use theme for a website, the challenge for them is to offer an end-to-end online experience for their customers. The time and effort to integrate a payment gateway are too much for them. This is where Razorpay payment button can come into the picture. The following challenges can be solved with our latest offering: * Effortless & no-coding payment solution at hand * Multiple modes of payments + access to international payments [Create a Quick Pay Button](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/#/access/signin) ### Donate Button NGOs and similar organisations can use this button with a pre-set amount or can offer their customer to pay the amount of their choice by entering the desired value. #### Use case of Donate button ##### **1. NGOs** NGOs have been the pillars of humanity for a long time now. Be it animal welfare or adoption platforms, a natural disaster relief camp or a human rights awareness channel people from all the directions are seen to be coming for a common cause. While some of the NGOs have by now integrated a payment gateway to manage high volumes of transactions. There are thousands of NGOs, specific to geography or a society. Till today, they face challenges to accept funds from a person far away. [bctt tweet=”Razorpay Payment

Button can be a bridge in connecting two ends and can bring about a speedy change in the way things operate to-date.” username=””]The following are the major solution that can be addressed with this product: * [International payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-first-indian-payment-solution-to-launch-avs-for-cross-border-businesses/) with zero coding or design expertise * Set up unlimited payment buttons or offer an option to ‘Pay what you want’ ##### 2. Content creators With an upsurge in the use and availablity of social media, there has been a rise in individual contributors too. Individuals from all age groups are seen creating humourous, knowledgeable or a real-life based content in the form of a video, audio, blog etc. There are times where a brand wants to collaborate with this contributor to accept donation or the individual themselves want to raise funds for a cause. Since these creators usually have a blog for themselves, the challenge to raise funds can be easily sorted with Razorpay Payment Button. Listed below are the offerings which can be helpful in the scenario: * 5-minute solution to add a secure payment options with a pre-designed button template * Ability to create unlimited buttons and accept payments 24*7 [Create a Donate Button Now](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/#/access/signin) ### Buy Now Button This type of button is suited for event organisers and product or service sellers. You can choose to sell multiple items with varying quantities by embedding this button. #### Use case of Buy Now button ##### 1. Edtech One of the industries that have touched the lives of millions across India is Edtech. Renowned institutions and professors are working on designing a full-fledged online course for their students. This not only saves time and operational costs but also makes education available across the geographies. This trend has invited home tutors, school teachers, passion economy supporters etc. to go online because that’s where their audience is. It solves exactly for the two challenges faced by people: * No technical or design dependency to set this up * Easy to add on any section or fold of their website or blog They can also choose to run offers on a bundle of courses and offer a mobile-friendly experience to their students. While they pack their solutions with the help of coding or the website builders, one of

their highest levels of dilemma occurs when it comes to enabling the payment flow. _‘Should we integrate a payment gateway in the MVP?’_, they think. Well, Razorpay Payment Button comes as a rescue for such situations. This is how Payment Buttons can help early age startups: * Customizable designs with efficiency to run an offer * Offer multiple modes of payment to customers Not just this, even established businesses, who are rolling out and testing new features can use this feature in their [MVP](https://razorpay.com/learn/minimum-viable-product-mvp/)s and beta products! Razorpay Payment Button plugin for your WordPress and Elementor site is the [payment solution](https://razorpay.com/) that allows you to add a payment button on your website with zero coding and minimal technical expertise. Going live with a payment gateway based integration can be complicated. It requires dependency on technical expertise and investment for data storage. But the Razorpay Payment Button plugin allows you to instantly add the [payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/) function at the touch of a button on your WordPress and Elementor built website or blog pages. You can add a payment button widget on your WordPress website or blog simply by dragging and dropping. **Here is a quick look at the topics we will cover:** * What can I do with a Razorpay Payment Button plugin? * How to install Razorpay Payment Button plugin on your WordPress domain or localhost? * How to add a [Razorpay Payment Button](https://razorpay.com/payment-buttons/) on your WordPress and Elementor website after installing the plugin? #### **What is a payment button plugin?** A payment button plugin allows you to start [accepting payments](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) on your WordPress and Elementor websites instantly. With this plugin, you can place a Donate Now, Pay Now, Buy Now, or Subscribe Now button on your WordPress website/blog by yourself in less than 5 minutes. Razorpay Payment Button plugin is a one-stop solution to collect one-time and recurring payments on your WordPress website with a single plugin. #### **Razorpay Payment Button plugin: One button, many uses** If you have a website or blog hosted on WordPress or a page built with Elementor, you can use Razorpay Payment Button plugin to collect payments. The best part about this plugin? You can start instantly, with no coding and an easy to set up configuration. > **Razorpay Payment Button allows you to create a button with pre-made templates and multiple customisations.** Here are some ways you can use the plugin: 1. **Donations**: If you are an NGO, you will aim to collect donations from the good samaritans of society to help those in need. Razorpay Payment Button plugin enables you to add a ‘**Donate Now**’ button to instantly collect donations on your WordPress

website. You can also send automated and 80G receipts to your customers. Accept donations with a pre-set amount or offer your customers to donate the amount of their choice by entering the desired value. ![Image 3: Source credits: Pawco.in and excloosiv.com](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/NGO_Use-Case_Blog-1-1024x576.jpg) Source credits: Pawco. in and excloosiv. com 2. **Selling online:**Many businesses have gone online post the COVID-19 pandemic. eCommerce businesses need a seamless checkout experience for their customers to increase their visitors to customers conversions. When placed with the listed products, a payment button allows customers to make payments on the same page. That means no redirections and a hassle-free checkout experience. Razorpay Payment Button plugin lets you easily place the **‘Buy Now’**button on your WordPress website, collect relevant customer details, and record them in our powerful dashboard. You can sell multiple items in varying quantities with the help of this plugin!![Image 4: Source credits: https://www.gadgetmobileguru. com/new-arrival-1/](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/ecommerce-blog.png) Source credits: https://www.gadgetmobileguru. com/new-arrival-1/ 3. **Online courses:**To start selling your education course online, you can add a **‘Pay Now’**button on your WordPress website. You can place unlimited buttons with each of your course plans on your WordPress and Elementor site with Razorpay payment plugins. 4. **Recurring Payments for Subscriptions/Memberships Plan:** If you want to start accepting membership/subscription-based payments for your premium content, newsletter, fitness subscriptions and digital products, you can simply add a ‘Subscribe Now’ button with the help of this plugin.![Image 5: Source credits: Coachprabhu](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Add-a-subheading-3.gif) Source credits: Coachprabhu To know more about Subscription Buttons refer to our [product documentation.](https://razorpay.com/docs/payment-button/subscription-buttons/) Related Read: [What is eCommerce POS Integration & How to Streamline Offline & Online Sales?](https://razorpay.com/blog/ecommerce-pos-integration/) ### What can you do with a Razorpay Payment Button plugin? 1. **Pre-made templates:**Add ‘Donate Now’, ‘Buy Now’, ‘Support Now’ and more customisable buttons with pre-made templates to your WordPress website 2. **Checkout experience:**Build a seamless checkout experience for your customers with no redirections and more conversions 3. **Accept payments from UPI and other payment modes:**Give your customers the power to choose from their preferred [mode of payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/different-types-of-payment-methods/). Razorpay Payment Button plugin lets your customers choose from more than 100+ payment modes, including credit/debit card, net banking, UPI, wallets and more 4. **One time and recurring payments:**Accept one-time and [recurring payments](https://razorpay.com/subscriptions/) to add subscriptions/membership plan based payment methods on WordPress site through one plugin 5. **Automated receipts:**Send automated payment receipts and 80G receipts to your customers 6. **Powerful dashboard:** Make data-driven business decisions using insights from reports available on our easy-to-understand analytics dashboard 7. **Create it your way:** Customise your payment buttons to reflect your brand colours and design 8. **Database, managed by us:**Collect information important to your business by adding and modifying fields on the checkout 9. **Pricing fields options:**List multiple products, or allow customers to choose the amount they want to pay 10. **Customized message:**Share love with your supporters in your own words with customised thank you messages 11. **Accept international payments:** Go global with your business by accepting payments by Razorpay’s [International payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) from many countries across the world **[Download the Plugin for

WordPress](https://wordpress.org/plugins/razorpay-payment-button/)** **[Download the Plugin for Elementor](https://wordpress.org/plugins/razorpay-payment-button-elementor/)** #### How much does a Razorpay Payment Button plugin cost? Nothing!! Razorpay Payment Button plugin is a free payment plugin for WordPress and Elementor built websites. With zero-set up cost pay for a platform fee only when a transaction is done. So, get started with it right away! ## How to install Razorpay Payment Button plugin? You can add the plugin directly from your WordPress account following the instructions below, or [download the WordPress plugin as a .zip file](https://wordpress.org/plugins/razorpay-payment-button/) or [download the Elementor plugin as a .zip file](https://wordpress.org/plugins/razorpay-payment-button-elementor/) and upload it to your WordPress admin dashboard. #### Install Razorpay button plugin from within WordPress: * Log in to your WordPress website admin dashboard * In the left sidebar menu, navigate to **Plugins**>**Add New** * Search for _the_[_Razorpay Payment Button for WordPress plugin_](https://wordpress.org/plugins/razorpay-payment-button/)_(For WordPress site page),_[_Razorpay Payment Button for Elementor_](https://wordpress.org/plugins/razorpay-payment-button-elementor/)_(For an Elementor page)_ * In the upper right, click **Install Now** * Click **Activate Plugin** ### Follow these steps after the activation flow: * Log in to your Razorpay Account * In the left sidebar menu, navigate to **Settings → API Keys → Copy API Keys** ![Image 6: Step 2](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Blog-SS-1-.png) Step 2 * On your **WordPress Admin Dashboard**: In the left sidebar menu, navigate to**Razorpay button → Settings → Add API Secret Keys and details** ![Image 7: Step 3](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Blog-SS-2.png) Step 3 ### For Localhost integration: Refer to [Product Documentation](https://razorpay.com/docs/payment-button/supported-platforms/wordpress/) if you are building a website on localhost. After installing and activating the plugin, you’ll see a new _Settings_ option under your dashboard. Now your Razorpay Account and WordPress Account are connected. ![Image 8: You can track all your buttons on WordPress as well as on Razorpay Dashboard](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Blog-SS-3.png) You can track all your buttons on WordPress as well as on Razorpay Dashboard ### How to add a Razorpay Payment Button on your WordPress and Elementor site, after installing the plugins Click **Pages** and navigate to the page where you want to embed the Payment button ![Image 9: Step 1](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Blog-SS-4.png) Step 1 Select **Add Block** → **Widgets** → **Razorpay: Payment button** to embed the Payment button onto the page. ![Image 10: Step 2](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Blog-SS-5.png) Step 2 Choose the Payment button using the drop-down and publish or update the page. ![Image 11: Step 3](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/Blog-SS-6-GIF.png) Step 3 The Payment button appears on the page. ![Image 12: Step 4](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2021/08/image-1024x547.png) Step 4 _Start your growth journey with the Razorpay Payment Button plugin for your WordPress and Elementor website today! Offer UPI, credit/debit card, international payments and more with just one payment button. ### **4)****Caring is what makes us human – The Social Worker/NGO** If you are a social worker, you would need the help of some good samaritans to help you with donations and work on the cause you choose to promote. Taking Bouquets Beyond Borders: FnP’s Global Leap with Razorpay [May 27, 2025](https://razorpay.com/blog/fnp-and-razorpay/)2 Mins Read [![Image 2: Fnp and Razorpay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-Banner-28-Fnp-1024x536.jpg)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-Banner-28-Fnp.jpg) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F&text=Taking%20Bouquets%20Beyond%20Borders%3A%20FnP%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Leap%20with%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Taking%20Bouquets%20Beyond%20Borders%3A%20FnP%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Leap%20with%20Razorpay&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F "Email") > _We make moments special with thoughtful gifting_ **_— Pawan Gadia, Global CEO, FnP_** That’s not just a vision – it’s the heartbeat of everything FnP does. It all started with one bouquet. One simple, heartfelt attempt to add a touch of meaning to a gift. But in that single act of curation lay a much bigger idea: what if gifting could be more than a formality? What if it became a way to truly connect people—across time zones, generations, and borders? And so, Ferns N Petals was born, not just as a flower shop, but as a mission to craft memories. Since 1994, FnP has grown into India’s go-to destination for celebrations. From romantic surprises and birthday hampers to “just because” gestures, FnP has been there for millions, delivering love in a box to over **100+ countries.** But here’s the thing, gifting isn’t just about what’s in the box. It’s about how it makes someone feel. That’s why the team at FnP doesn’t just sell products; they sell moments. Thoughtfully chosen, perfectly timed, and incredibly personal. ## **When Distance Meets Delight, Razorpay Makes It Possible for FnP** To truly become a global celebration enabler, FnP needed more than just a wide bouquet catalog; they needed the ability to collect payments seamlessly from across the world. That’s where Razorpay stepped in. With Razorpay’s[**International Payments gateway**](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/), FnP unlocked a world of possibilities—powering smooth, secure cross-border transactions and making global gifting as seamless as sending flowers next door. ## **Celebrating Together, Everywhere** From late-night surprises to long-distance love, FnP is turning every moment into something magical. And with [Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/) powering seamless global payments, those moments now travel the world with ease. Because when the right partner joins the journey, every celebration feels closer. Here’s to thoughtful gifting, made borderless with FnP and Razorpay. **_We are backing India’s boldest. Take a look at how we are making it happen with other brands_**[![Image 3: CTA - Backing India's Boldest](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2025/05/Blog-banner.png)](https://razorpay.com/m/bold/?utm_source=google&utm_medium=blog-CTA&utm_campaign=founder-articles) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F&text=Taking%20Bouquets%20Beyond%20Borders%3A%20FnP%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Leap%20with%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Ffnp-and-razorpay%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F05%2FBlog-Banner-28-Fnp.jpg&description=Taking%20Bouquets%20Beyond%20Borders%3A%20FnP%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Leap%20with%20Razorpay "Pinterest") ![Image 4](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/ee5a53049f2dabfd6ee682311fb9e90d708e6c4ead903b315e53dfa5a96dafc0?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Razorpay Marketing Team](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/razorpay-marketing-team/ "Posts by Razorpay Marketing Team") The Razorpay Marketing Team is a passionate group of storytellers, strategists, and creators driving the brand’s vision to empower India’s boldest builders. Etourist’s Global Journey Simplified by Razorpay’s Trusted Solutions [November 5, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/etourists-journey-simplified-by-razorpay/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: E tourist Banner](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/E-tourist-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/E-tourist.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fetourists-journey-simplified-by-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fetourists-journey-simplified-by-razorpay%2F&text=Etourist%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Journey%20Simplified%20by%20Razorpay%E2%80%99s%20Trusted%20Solutions "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fetourists-journey-simplified-by-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Etourist%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Journey%20Simplified%20by%20Razorpay%E2%80%99s%20Trusted%20Solutions&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fetourists-journey-simplified-by-razorpay%2F "Email") Etourist Services Private Limited provides comprehensive and seamless visa consultation services for international travelers visiting Sri Lanka, Cambodia, and Turkey. Operating entirely online, Etourist is dedicated to simplifying the e-visa application process, ensuring a smooth and efficient experience for tourists from around the world. With clients spanning over 200 countries, Etourist has established itself as a trusted resource for international travelers, with plans to expand its offerings to additional countries soon. Given its global client base, efficient international [payment processing](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-payment-processing/) is essential for Etourist. Razorpay has been the ideal partner, enabling smooth and secure cross-border transactions. ![Image 3: Etourist data](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2024/11/E-tourist-3.png) ![Image 4: E-tourist quote](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2024/11/E-tourist-2.png) ## **Roadblocks on the Route** Before partnering with Razorpay, Etourist Services Private Limited encountered multiple challenges in managing [international payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/). **Complex payment processing systems** and a **high transaction failure rate**presented significant hurdles, often frustrating both customers and the Etourist team. **Limited payment options** further restricted their ability to cater to a global clientele, and **delayed settlements** impacted business operations. **Poor customer support** from their previous international payment gateway was a critical concern, especially when issues arose and needed timely resolution. Recognizing the need for robust customer service and improved payment processing, Etourist sought a more dependable and responsive solution. ## **Crossing Borders, Simplifying Payments** Razorpay empowered Etourist Services Private Limited with an optimized, frictionless payment solution that directly addressed their challenges. By integrating Razorpay’s **Instant Activation** and API-driven platform, Etourist experienced immediate, simplified access to payment processing. The platform’s **User Experience-first Interface** enabled their global customers to navigate payments effortlessly, eliminating prior frustrations with complex systems. Razorpay’s **extensive Payment Suite**, allowed Etourist to offer [payment methods](https://razorpay.com/blog/different-types-of-payment-methods/) tailored to their **diverse clientele across 200+ countries.** Security, a top priority given Etourist’s high percentage of repeat customers, was fortified with Razorpay’s **Razorpay’s [PCI DSS](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-pci-dss-compliance/) Level 1 compliance and AI-ML fraud detection algorithms**, ensuring sensitive data protection and transaction integrity. Etourist also benefited from **Razorpay’s Dynamic Routing**, significantly reducing transaction failure rates and increasing processing speed, particularly valuable during their peak season from September to March. Razorpay’s Dedicated Support Team further enhanced Etourist’s operational efficiency by providing prompt issue resolution and ongoing support, a marked improvement from previous experiences. ## **Onward to New Destinations** Etourist Services Private Limited is set for rapid growth in the coming years, with plans to expand its seamless visa consultation services to even more countries. With a strong focus on simplifying the visa process and serving international travelers across diverse regions.

As they pursue this journey, Razorpay will remain a trusted partner, supporting Etourist’s mission to deliver smooth and secure online experiences for international travelers. # Know the Particularities of Wealth Management-RazorpayX [![Image 1: Razorpay Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2020/06/Logo.svg)](https://razorpay.com/ "Razorpay Blog") * [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) * [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) * [Exclusive](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/exclusive/) * [Forex](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/forex/) * [Online Commerce](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/online-commerce/) * [Payroll](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payroll/) * [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) * [Inspiration Brew](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/inspiration-brew/) * [Policies with Dr. Poli](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/policies-with-dr-poli/) [Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog) » [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) » Know the Particulars of Wealth Management In[Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) # Know the Particulars of Wealth Management [February 14, 2023](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: wealth management](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/Wealth-management-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/Wealth-management.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F&text=Know%20the%20Particulars%20of%20Wealth%20Management "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Know%20the%20Particulars%20of%20Wealth%20Management&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F "Email") Wealth management deals with a branch of financial services that involves disciplines and monetary strategies, helping organisations define financial goals and preserve and develop their business wealth. It is a tailor-made investment advisory service that is extended to prosperous business clients, which encompasses several monetary services like investment advice, accounting retirement, estate planning, tax services etc. Generally, a holistic approach is taken to incorporate and coordinate all the particularities of the client’s monetary structure into a robust wealth plan and guide them to establish themselves in the competitive business landscape. Table of Contents Toggle - [x] * [What Is Wealth Management?](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/#What_Is_Wealth_Management) * [Typical Examples of Wealth Management](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/#Typical_Examples_of_Wealth_Management) * [Wealth Management Business Structures](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/#Wealth_Management_Business_Structures) * [Advantages of Wealth Management](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/#Advantages_of_Wealth_Management) * [How RazorpayX Helps in Optimising Business Wealth?](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/#How_RazorpayX_Helps_in_Optimising_Business_Wealth) * [Frequently Asked Questions](https://razorpay.com/blog/business-banking/wealth-management/#Frequently_Asked_Questions) ## **What Is Wealth Management?** Wealth management (WM) is a well-rounded professional funding advisory service that includes varied financial services and monetary offerings to address the complex needs of business clients. In this, the marketing consultant or financial advisor opts for a consultative approach and fetches information regarding clients’ needs and the situations they are in. Then the advisor drafts a customised strategy using different financial services and products as per the retrieved information. Prompt assistance from the financial advisor will help business bodies avoid financial pitfalls and improve their financial standing. ## **Typical Examples of Wealth Management** A team of professionals work together in a wealth management office to extend financial advice to clients from different fields. For example, for a business client who has a substantial amount in investable assets along with a trust meant for family members, the wealth manager will assist the client by investing the amount in a discretionary account and extend will and trust services that will prove effective in minimising tax [liability](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-liability-in-accounting/) and estate planning. Some of the other instances of wealth management are as follows: * ### **Asset Allocation** Asset allocation is a type of wealth management strategy that deals with making investments in a combination of varied asset classes (like, bonds, cash, stocks etc.). This is meant to lower the inherent risk on one’s investment portfolio. * ### **Retirement Planning** Retirement planning involves a plan that aims to secure one’s future financial stability. Planning includes an assessment of the current financial status and analysing how much to save for the future. ## **Wealth Management Business Structures** The wealth management business structure and related strategies vary depending on business bodies. As per requirement, a client might have to seek

service from a specific wealth manager or a specified wealth management team. However, the entire motive to seek the assistance of wealth management professionals is to secure and improve the financial health of a business entity. A financial advisor will help businesses attain their financial goals by helping in increasing their net worth, improving cash flow, reducing the debt burden and more. The advisor will aid business entities in making better decisions, which will generate revenue and accelerate cash flow. ## **Advantages of Wealth Management** Comprehensive wealth management bestows business bodies with the following benefits: * The monetary service is customised to cater to the funding desires of the affluent client. It combines a wide range of monetary offerings * The advisory services offered under wealth management deals with client-sensitive business details. The confidentiality of the retrieved details is maintained by the investment advisors during financial planning. * The offerings and practices vary from one business entity to another. * It is a holistic technique where a financial advisor supervises all the offerings and manages cash and plan as per the client’s requirements. * With the assistance of wealth management firms, business bodies can have access to varied services like asset management, financial planning etc. * With robust financial planning businesses can ensure positive cash flow and balance business earnings and spending. Opting for a wealth management service, or any financial solution provider like Razorpayx will help entrepreneurs get maximum return from their investment. For instance, with the RazorpayX [payouts](https://razorpay.com/x/payouts/) platform, organisations can easily schedule payments and clear the same on time, helping in streamlining business operations and improving the financial status of a business. ## **How RazorpayX Helps in Optimising Business Wealth?** [RazorpayX](https://razorpay.com/x/current-accounts/?utm_adgroup=&utm_gclid=CjwKCAiA0JKfBhBIEiwAPhZXD7iGtebthu6wk4dreZqDfDJFVpABzQDdaMpssD5MKcc1vp1e3avKbhoCZ7gQAvD_BwE&utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=GoogleSearch_RZPx_Brand_CA_24062021&utm_term=razorpayx&utm_content=text_3&gclid=CjwKCAiA0JKfBhBIEiwAPhZXD7iGtebthu6wk4dreZqDfDJFVpABzQDdaMpssD5MKcc1vp1e3avKbhoCZ7gQAvD_BwE), supercharges business finances by extending different services. From accessing the current account, and scheduling payments to view financial reports. [Explore RazorpayX](https://razorpay.com/x/?r=blog_cta_business_banking_wealth_management&utm_source=blog&utm_medium=cta) The [digital payment](https://razorpay.com/learn/digital-payments-india-definition-methods-importance/) platform has implemented the RazorpayX [Forex funding](https://razorpay.com/x/forex/home) service. It is a cross-border offering that helps small businesses and startups accept payments through an [international payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) and raise funds globally. The group of professionals will also get the compliance right and bestow organisations with crystal clear rate quotes. [Explore RazorpayX-powered Current Account](https://razorpay.com/x/?r=blog_cta_business_banking_wealth_management&utm_source=blog&utm_medium=cta) ## Frequently Asked Questions ### How much fee does a wealth manager charge? The fee structure of a financial advisor is different across different wealth management services and is based on the client's or patron's AUM (Asset Under Management). ### What are the services that are offered by wealth management firms? A wealth management firm helps businesses with investment management, tax advice, financial planning and more. ### What are the attributes of an ideal wealth manager? A financial advisor must be able to help businesses with a solid and comprehensive financial plan. An ideal wealth manager must have credibility, competency, robust customer service and communication. They must be capable enough to extend complimentary services like insurance services, tax planning etc. [wealth management](https://razorpay.com/blog/tag/wealth-management/) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F "Share on Facebook")[](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F&text=Know%20the%20Particulars%20of%20Wealth%20Management "Share on Twitter")[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F "LinkedIn")[](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbusiness-banking%2Fwealth-management%2F&media=https%3A%2F%2Fblog.razorpay.in%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2023%2F02%2FWealth-management.png&description=Know%20the%20Particulars%20of%20Wealth%20Management "Pinterest") ![Image 3](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/5f98216ebb931634fd6c23231be68bb59b02491b21dafaf7724634b2b2ef1944?s=82&d=mm&r=g) Author[Aratrica Chakraborty](https://razorpay.com/blog/author/aratrica-chakraborty/ "Posts by Aratrica Chakraborty") Content

Razorpay Introduces EEFC Account: Adam Vacations Soars to Success Beyond Boundaries [July 9, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-eefc-account-adam-vacations/)3 Mins Read [![Image 2: Razorpay Introduces EEFC Account: Adam Vacations Soars to Success Beyond Boundaries](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Case-Study-Header-Adam-Vacations-2-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Case-Study-Header-Adam-Vacations-2.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-eefc-account-adam-vacations%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-eefc-account-adam-vacations%2F&text=Razorpay%20Introduces%20EEFC%20Account%3A%20Adam%20Vacations%20Soars%20to%20Success%20Beyond%20Boundaries "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-eefc-account-adam-vacations%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Razorpay%20Introduces%20EEFC%20Account%3A%20Adam%20Vacations%20Soars%20to%20Success%20Beyond%20Boundaries&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Frazorpay-eefc-account-adam-vacations%2F "Email") In the dynamic realm of travel, where dreams take flight and adventures become stories, there’s a remarkable tale that began in 2017 with just two visionaries – Barun Kumar and Kritik Kumar. They dared to dream beyond the ordinary, building Adam Vacations, a bootstrap marvel that evolved from humble origins to a global force in the travel industry. Leveraging technology and sheer persistence, it has now emerged as a leading travel solutions provider across key regions, including India, USA, UK, Canada, Spain, and the UAE. However, just as they were poised to conquer the European markets, Adam Vacations faced a daunting challenge – managing complex multi-currency payments and efficiently paying global vendors and employees in their respective local currencies. Furthermore, the need for a comprehensive payment solution that aligned with the European government’s payment safety compliance rules was paramount. The ideal solution had to not only facilitate cross-border transactions but also integrate seamlessly with existing systems and applications, promising to enhance efficiency. That’s when Razorpay launched a game-changing solution – [EEFC](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-eefc-for-international-card-payments/#:~:text=Razorpay%20facilitates%20the%20setup%20of,the%20complexities%20of%20currency%20conversion.) (Exchange Earners’ Foreign Currency) accounts, powered by ICICI. **Empowering Adam Vacations Global Expansion with Razorpay’s EEFC Account** Razorpay’s innovative integration of [EEFC (Exchange Earners’ Foreign Currency) accounts](https://razorpay.com/blohttps://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-eefc-for-international-card-payments/g/razorpay-eefc-for-international-card-payments/), powered by ICICI, gave Adam Vacations a significant advantage in handling [international payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/). EEFC accounts are special accounts with no interest paid on them and are maintained in foreign currency with authorized banks. Various types of earnings can be credited into an EEFC account, including inward remittances, export-related payments, professional earnings, and more. Below are the key advantages of Adam Vacations using EEFC Accounts: 1. **Cost Savings and Efficiency** By utilizing an EEFC account, Adam Vacations minimized the costs associated with currency conversion. An EEFC account, maintained in foreign currency, allows foreign exchange earners to credit 100% of their earnings directly into the account. This not only reduced financial inefficiencies but also ensured that the company could manage its international earnings more effectively. 1. **Convenient Fund Management** The flexibility offered by the EEFC account allowed Adam Vacations to manage its foreign exchange earnings efficiently. Funds could be used for various permissible purposes, including outward remittances and trade-related payments, simplifying their international transactions and improving overall operational efficiency. 1. **Enhanced Vendor Relationships** By making direct payouts to international vendors in their preferred currency, Adam Vacations fostered stronger, more reliable relationships with

their suppliers. This capability was crucial in building trust and ensuring timely payments, which are essential for maintaining a robust supply chain. 1. **Compliance and Documentation Support** Razorpay facilitated the seamless issuance of [Foreign Inward Remittance Statements (FIRS)](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-firs-automated-digital-firs/), which was pivotal for Adam Vacations in adhering to Indian tax regulations and expediting GST refunds. This automation reduced manual efforts and enhanced operational efficiency, contributing to smoother financial operations. ![Image 3](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2024/07/Quote-image-Adam-Vacations-1024x536.png) **Tap into the Global Market with Razorpay EEFC Accounts!** Razorpay’s EEFC support has not only streamlined Adam Vacations’ international transactions but also minimized costs and created a solution where the payments to the vendors were made in their respective currencies. By leveraging these innovative solutions, Adam Vacations has successfully navigated the complexities of cross-border payments, enabling them to focus on growth and expansion in the global market. Razorpay International Payments continues to be a vital partner in their journey towards international success. Accepting International Payments Gets Easier with Razorpay [June 4, 2020](https://razorpay.com/blog/accept-international-payments-razorpay/)6 Mins Read [![Image 2: Accepting International Payments Gets Easier with Razorpay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/accept-international-payments-1-1024x512.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/accept-international-payments-1.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-international-payments-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-international-payments-razorpay%2F&text=Accepting%20International%20Payments%20Gets%20Easier%20with%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-international-payments-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=Accepting%20International%20Payments%20Gets%20Easier%20with%20Razorpay&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Faccept-international-payments-razorpay%2F "Email") Global aspiration for Indian businesses used to be reserved for large enterprises. Between 2000 and 2010, the businesses that grew a reputation of expanding beyond the Indian borders were likely owned by industrial giants such as Reliance Industries, Tata Group or software powerhouses like Wipro and Infosys. Building this reputation either required an endless war chest, or a discipline to pull out all the stops, and sometimes both. But now, a decade later, a number of Indian companies are heading for international shores. While expanding into international markets comes with its own hurdles, it also helps drive more revenue and creates a competitive edge that can become a key differentiator in the market. In some cases, it is possible without additional investment. Thanks to newer payments innovations it is easy to expand to new markets quickly. Customers are more likely to buy from your site repeatedly when you allow them to pay in their local currencies. In order to generate more revenue internationally, it’s crucial to partner with a [Payment Service Provider](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-a-payment-service-provider/) that can extend proper multi-currency support. ## What is multi-currency support? Multi-currency support means that your customers can pay for your product or service using their local currency. Typically, buyers in most countries are forced to make purchases from Indian businesses in INR during international transactions, which can make the whole experience feel forced and reduce the buyer’s trust in the transaction and seller. This can also lead to abandoned carts and lost sales. Listing prices in the local currency and allowing users to pay in the currency of their country can make your customers feel at home while completing purchases. _With Razorpay’s [International Payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) feature, we have introduced multi-currency support for up to 100 currencies including the popular United States Dollar, Great Britain Pounds, Singapore Dollars, Euro and UAE Dirham._ _See the [full list of supported currencies](https://razorpay.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/11000065530-what-currencies-does-razorpay-support-) here._ You can now list and accept payments in the local currency of your customers based on their location and preferences. ## Multi-currency support and reduced chargebacks Accepting payments in the local currency is not only convenient for customers but can also reduce the risk of [chargebacks](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-a-chargeback/). Transactions processed in local currency do not incur additional currency conversion charges in their bank statements. Unknown charges in the bank statement due to changed currencies can often lead to a poor buying experience. It is highly likely that customers will request a refund or a chargeback due to dissatisfaction with the added

fees and may abandon the purchase altogether. This is something that you obviously don’t want. Which is where Razorpay comes into the picture. You can increase customer satisfaction and reduce cart abandonments by integrating with international payments on Razorpay. ## Accept international payments with Razorpay Accepting payments from customers abroad is made convenient and simple with Razorpay–that too for businesses from varied industries and sectors like travel, SaaS, education, retail, healthcare, etc. International payment acceptance comes auto-enabled for eligible businesses. Other businesses can request international payment acceptance through a simple application form on their [Razorpay dashboard](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/signin). ### Here’s how international payments on Razorpay boosts your growth * Accept payments through cards issued by foreign banks or PayPal wallet * Instant [payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/) integration and activation for eligible businesses * Support for nearly 100 currencies * Currency conversion by Razorpay * Settlements in INR * Competitive pricing at 3% per transaction Here’s what **Unacademy**, one of India’s hottest ed-tech startup has to say about Razorpay’s International Payments: > Partnering with Razorpay’s support for International Payments has played a pivotal role in enabling us to seamlessly cater to our international learners. The easy integration and setup, along with support for 100 currencies has helped us take our offering to a wider audience abroad. > > – Gaurav Munjal, CEO & Founder, Unacademy ICICI Lombard, a big player in the insurance industry, also has benefited vastly by integrating with us: > With customers making insurance bookings from across the world, it becomes extremely crucial to ensure that we offer a platform that enables them to pay in all currencies. Now, with Razorpay’s International Payments supporting 100 currencies, I believe that this process will only get easier and efficient for customers to make and accept payments across borders. We look forward to building happier customers with this association. > > -Pintu Mahato, Product Manager, ICICI Lombard You can accept payments from International cards using [Razorpay Payment Gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/) as well as different products in our product suite: ### Subscriptions Offer your international customers plans with automated [recurring transactions](https://razorpay.com/subscriptions/) on various payment modes in their own currency. Your customers can subscribe on the basis of fixed payments, quantities or specific usage. ### Payment Links Share links through email, SMS, chatbots or messengers to quickly accept payments from foreign customers. No matter where in the world your customer resides, all they need is the [link to make a payment](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) to you. ### Invoices [Create and send invoices](https://razorpay.com/invoices/) to allow your customers abroad to pay instantly. You can also enable your customers to make partial payments if required. ### Payment Pages The easiest way to accept payments from international customers with custom-branded [hosted pages](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/) that require zero coding, website or app. Allow customers to make donations, pay fees or buy products easily from a foreign country. You can also accept payments in international currencies from your customers using Razorpay APIs. In the API request, along with the “amount” field, you can now pass different values in the “currency”

field. It is as simple as that. ``` curl -u rzp_test_26ccbdbfe0e84b:69b2e24411e384f91213f22a \ https://api.razorpay.com/v1/orders -X POST \ --data "amount=50000" \ --data "currency=USD" \ --data "receipt=Receipt #RCPTID43" \ --data "payment_capture=1" https://api.razorpay.com/v1/orders ``` ## **Get global today** To conclude, for the longest time, businesses in India have been losing out on customers and business because of the inability to accept payments from other countries. Finding the right payments partner can give your international aspirations the shot in the arm it needs to stay a step ahead and a level above everybody else. The internet has allowed running a business to not be constrained by geographies–why should accepting payments be? Read more about Razorpay’s International Payments acceptance feature here. International businesses can now seamlessly accept payments from India with Razorpay [June 20, 2022](https://razorpay.com/blog/international-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay/)6 Mins Read [![Image 2: international businesses can now seamlessly accept payments from india with razorpay](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/international-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay-1024x536.webp)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/international-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay.webp) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Finternational-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Finternational-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay%2F&text=International%20businesses%20can%20now%20seamlessly%20accept%20payments%20from%20India%20with%20Razorpay "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Finternational-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=International%20businesses%20can%20now%20seamlessly%20accept%20payments%20from%20India%20with%20Razorpay&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Finternational-businesses-can-now-seamlessly-accept-payments-from-india-with-razorpay%2F "Email") India is one of the largest and fastest growing economies in the world. With its enormous domestic market, India is increasingly becoming a preferred destination for global businesses, who want to accept payments from India. The Union government has spoken of India’s digital economy growing from about $200 billion in 2017 to between $800 billion and $1 trillion by 2030. This would imply that the share of the digital economy [would](https://theprint.in/opinion/digital-india-a-good-start-but-govt-must-build-capabilities-for-robust-growth/780327/)[grow](https://www.livemint.com/economy/indias-digital-economy-to-see-exponential-growth-to-800-bn-by-2030-fm-11647014673827.html) from about 8 per cent to 18-23 percent inside the next decade. To enable this, the government has taken numerous measures to facilitate an easy market entry and promote global collaborations. In addition to these reforms, the increase in international business opportunities in India has stemmed from technological disruption, internet penetration, and rising incomes. However, accepting payments from Indian customers has been a pain point for international businesses.
