A Step-by-Step Guide](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#How_do_Multiple_Payment_Gateways_Work_A_Step-by-Step_Guide) * [Benefits of Using Multiple Payment Gateways](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#Benefits_of_Using_Multiple_Payment_Gateways) * [Challenges of Managing Multiple Payment Gateways](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#Challenges_of_Managing_Multiple_Payment_Gateways) * [When to Choose Multiple Payment Gateways?](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#When_to_Choose_Multiple_Payment_Gateways) * [Multi-Currency Payment Gateway vs. Multiple Payment Gateways](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#Multi-Currency_Payment_Gateway_vs_Multiple_Payment_Gateways) * [Integrate Your Online Business with Razorpay Optimizer](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#Integrate_Your_Online_Business_with_Razorpay_Optimizer) * [FAQs](https://razorpay.com/blog/multiple-payment-gateways/#FAQs) ## What is a Multiple Payment Gateway? Multiple payment gateways refer to the use of more than one [payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/blog/payment-gateway-101/) to process various online [payment methods](https://razorpay.com/blog/different-types-of-payment-methods/) for customers on a single website or app. This setup offer diverse payment options like credit or debit cards, [UPI](https://razorpay.com/upi/), [QR Code](https://razorpay.com/qr-code/) and [digital wallets](https://razorpay.com/blog/digital-wallet/), enhancing transaction reliability and customer satisfaction. _**Related Read:**_[What are the Different Types of Payment Gateway?](https://razorpay.com/blog/different-types-of-payment-gateway/) ## Multiple Payment Gateway Example A customer attempted to pay for a product using Amazon Pay digital wallet on an e-commerce platform. When the payment failed due to a technical issue with Amazon Pay’s gateway, the platform’s system automatically routed the transaction to an another **[payment gateway (like Razorpay)](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/)**. The alternative gateway successfully processed the payment, ensuring a seamless and uninterrupted customer experience. This demonstrates the advantages of having multiple [payment gateways integrated into an e-commerce platform](https://razorpay.com/ecommerce-payment-gateway-india/), as it helps mitigate risks associated with payment failures and provides a more reliable and customer-friendly experience. ## Essential Features for Multiple Payment Gateways ### 1. Supports Multiple Digital Payment Methods Offering a variety of payment methods such as credit or debit cards, UPI, QR Code, digital wallets, and bank transfers. It is crucial to accommodate different customer preferences. By integrating multiple payment gateways in India, you can provide multiple payment options, increasing the chances of completing a sale and improving customer satisfaction. ### 2. Supports Multiple Currency Payments Supporting [international payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) is essential for businesses targeting global markets. A payment gateway that can process different currencies and work across borders ensures you can reach and serve customers worldwide without limitations. ### 3. Easy Integration with eCommerce Platforms The ease of integrating payment gateways with your e-commerce platform or other business systems is a critical factor. Seamless integration reduces technical challenges and helps you manage payments more efficiently, ensuring a smooth customer checkout process. ### 4. Encrypted Transactions Between Customers and Merchants’ Banks Strong security measures and compliance with industry standards like [PCI DSS](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-pci-dss-compliance/) are non-negotiable when managing multiple payment gateways. Ensuring robust encryption and fraud detection helps protect

sensitive customer data and builds trust in your platform. ### 5. Lower Payment Gateway Transaction Fees Comparing transaction fees across different payment gateways is important. Lower fees can significantly impact your profit margins, so choosing payment gateways that offer competitive pricing without compromising on quality is essential. ### 6. Customer Support Reliable and responsive customer support is essential for payment gateways. Issues can arise anytime, and having access to quick, effective support ensures that problems are resolved promptly, minimizing disruptions to your business operations. ### 7. Additional Features Look for extra features like fraud prevention tools, [chargeback management](https://razorpay.com/blog/chargebacks/), and support for [recurring payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-recurring-billing/). These added functionalities can enhance your payment system, protect your business, and provide a better experience for your customers. ## How do Multiple Payment Gateways Work? A Step-by-Step Guide Multiple payment gateways functions by seamlessly integrating with your [eCommerce](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-ecommerce/) platforms. This integration enables transactions to be routed through the most appropriate gateway based on factors like payment method, currency, and geographic location. This flexible system reduces the risk of payment failures and provides a smoother checkout experience for customers. **Here’s a breakdown of the step-by-step process** ### STEP 1. Integration with your eCommerce Platforms #### 1.1 Check eCommerce Platform Compatibility It’s crucial to ensure that your selected payment gateways are compatible with your e-commerce platform. Without proper compatibility, you may face issues during transactions or be unable to integrate the gateways at all. #### 1.2 Initiate Technical Integration To integrate multiple payment gateways into your e-commerce platform, you’ll use APIs or plugins provided by the payment gateway providers. These tools help your business to connect your website with [payment processors](https://razorpay.com/blog/payment-processor/), allowing seamless [payment processing](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-payment-processing/). #### 1.3 Testing and Optimisation After integration, thoroughly testing each payment gateway is essential. This ensures that there are no technical issues, and optimising performance helps you deliver a smoother payment experience to your customers. ### 2. Transaction Routing #### 2.1 Intelligent Routing Payment gateways can intelligently route transactions to the best gateway based on criteria such as customer location, currency, or the type of transaction. This helps reduce declines and maximise success rates. #### 2.2 Manual Routing Sometimes, you might prefer manual routing, where you select the payment gateway for specific transactions. This can be useful for high-value payments or niche markets where specific gateways perform better. #### 2.3 Failover Mechanisms Setting up failover mechanisms ensures continuous transaction processing, even if one gateway is unavailable. You can configure your system to automatically reroute payments to an alternative gateway in case of failures, reducing the risk of lost sales and ensuring consistent payment processing for your customers. ## Benefits of Using Multiple Payment Gateways ### 1. Expanded Customer Reach and Experience * Integrating multiple payment gateways allows you to appeal to a wider audience by offering various payment methods, including credit or debit cards, UPI, QR code, [mobile wallets](https://razorpay.com/learn/mobile-wallet/), and digital currencies. * By accommodating different payment preferences, you attract more customers and potentially increase your sales. This convenience helps build customer loyalty

and retain the customers to purchase again. ### 2. Reduced Cart Abandonment Rates * [Cart abandonment](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-abandoned-cart/) often occurs when customers do not find their preferred payment method at checkout. By integrating multiple payment processors, you minimize this risk. * Providing a multiple payment methods ensures that customers can complete their purchases without interruption, thereby [reducing cart abandonment](https://razorpay.com/blog/reduce-cart-abandonment-razorpay-truecaller/) rates and increasing conversion rates. ### 4. Mitigation of Risk and Increased Business Flexibility * Relying on a single payment gateway can expose your business to risks such as downtime or technical issues. * Implementing multiple payment gateways helps distribute this risk. If one gateway encounters problems, another can handle transactions, ensuring continuous operation. * This setup offers greater flexibility and stability for your business operations. ### 5. Enhanced Global Market Reach * Multiple payment gateways facilitate transactions in different currencies and regions. This capability is essential for businesses aiming to expand internationally. * By supporting multiple currencies and local payment methods, you cater to a global audience and streamline the purchasing process for international customers. ### 6. Increased Customer Trust * Offering a variety of well-known and trusted payment options can enhance customer confidence in your e-commerce platform. * Customers are more likely to complete transactions when they recognize and trust the payment methods available, contributing to a higher level of trust and security. ### 7. Easy Integration and Management * Modern payment gateways are designed to integrate smoothly with e-commerce platforms. * Setting up multiple payment processors is typically straightforward, thanks to the user-friendly integration tools provided by payment gateway providers. * This ease of integration allows for efficient management and operation of various payment methods. ### 8. Ongoing Testing and Optimization * Using multiple payment gateways provides the opportunity to test and optimize each one for performance. * Regular testing helps identify and address any issues, ensuring that each payment method functions smoothly. * This continuous optimization process contributes to a better overall payment experience for your customers. _**Related Read:**[**Difference Between Payment Gateway & Payment Processor**](https://razorpay.com/blog/difference-between-payment-processors-and-payment-gateways/)_ ## Challenges of Managing Multiple Payment Gateways ### 1. Technical Complexity * Managing multiple payment gateways involves significant technical challenges. Each gateway requires its own API and may need regular updates, complicating system integration. * Businesses must ensure their systems can handle these complexities seamlessly, potentially requiring experienced developers or third-party integration tools. ### 2. Increased Costs * Using multiple payment gateways can lead to higher expenses, including transaction fees, maintenance, and integration costs. These additional costs can affect your profitability. * Careful evaluation of each payment gateway’s cost-benefit ratio and negotiation for better rates can help manage these financial impacts. ### 3. Security Concerns * Handling various payment gateways can introduce security risks, as each may have different security protocols. * Ensuring robust fraud prevention and data protection across all gateways is crucial. * Regular security audits and adherence to best practices are necessary to safeguard customer data. ### 4. Regulatory Compliance * Compliance with regulatory standards and PCI DSS requirements can become

more complex with multiple gateways. * Each payment gateway may have unique compliance needs, making it essential to ensure all systems meet industry regulations and local laws to avoid penalties. ### 5. Customer Experience * Multiple payment gateways can impact customer experience if not managed well. * Issues such as payment gateway failures or a convoluted checkout process can frustrate customers and increase cart abandonment rates. * Ensuring a seamless and user-friendly checkout experience across all gateways is key to maintaining customer satisfaction. ## When to Choose Multiple Payment Gateways? ### 1. To Accept International Payments * Multiple payment gateways can help you accommodate various currencies and payment methods if your business targets international customers. * This ensures that your global audience can complete transactions smoothly, regardless of location. ### 2. Geographic Coverage * For businesses with a diverse customer base, offering various payment options is essential. * Multiple payment gateways allow you to cater to different payment preferences, improving the overall customer experience and expanding your reach. ### 3. High-Volume Transactions * Using multiple payment gateways can enhance scalability and reliability if your business processes many transactions daily. * This setup helps distribute the load, ensuring no gateway is overwhelmed and transactions are processed efficiently. ### 4. Risk Management * Managing payment risks is crucial, and multiple payment gateways provide a safety net by reducing your dependence on a single provider. * If one payment gateway experiences downtime or technical issues, you can switch to another, ensuring uninterrupted operations. ### 5. Future Growth * Businesses planning for future growth benefit from a flexible payment infrastructure. * Multiple payment gateways allow you to scale operations smoothly as your customer base expands, ensuring that your payment processing remains efficient and adaptable. ## **Multi-Currency Payment Gateway vs. Multiple Payment Gateways** ### **Feature**### **Multi-Currency Payment Gateway**### **Multiple Payment Gateways** **Core Functionality**Allows customers to pay in various currencies through a single payment gateway.Utilises multiple gateways to process payments, offering various payment options. **Number of Gateways**Only one gateway is required, which supports multiple currencies.Multiple gateways are used, each handling payments through different channels. **Integration Complexity**Easier to integrate, as you only need to manage one gateway.More complex integration due to managing connections with several gateways. **Currency Conversion**Currency conversion is handled within the gateway, usually at set rates.May require separate gateways for different currencies or external conversion services. **Fees**Typically includes currency conversion fees, which can vary by provider.Higher overall fees due to multiple transaction and maintenance charges across gateways. **Customer Experience**Streamlined experience with seamless multi-currency support in one gateway.Offers more payment options, improving flexibility but potentially complicating checkout. ## Integrate Your Online Business with Razorpay Optimizer [Razorpay Optimizer](https://razorpay.com/optimizer-intelligent-payments-routing/) simplifies the process of integrating and managing multiple payment gateways for your online business like marketplaces, eCommerce platforms, websites and apps. Its user-friendly dashboard provides a centralized platform to monitor and optimize various payment methods, including credit cards or debit cards, UPI, net banking, and wallets. Additionally, Razorpay Optimizer supports multiple currencies, making it ideal for businesses operating in

international markets. With Razorpay Optimizer’s AI-powered technology, you can automate payment workflows, detect fraud, and ensure seamless customer experiences across all payment channels. ## FAQs ### 1. How do multiple payment gateways enhance payment processing for online businesses? Multiple payment gateways enhance payment processing by offering flexibility and reducing the risk of transaction failures. They allow businesses to cater to different customer preferences and ensure that if one gateway faces an issue, another can handle the transaction. ### 2. Are there any limitations or challenges associated with integrating multiple payment gateways? Yes, integrating multiple payment gateways can be technically complex and costly. It requires proper integration with your platform, ongoing maintenance, and compliance with various security standards. ### 3. What factors should businesses consider when choosing multiple payment gateways? When choosing multiple payment gateways, businesses should consider payment modes, transaction fees, security features, and global reach. It’s also essential to evaluate the ease of integration with your platform and the level of customer support the gateways provide. ### 4. How can businesses effectively manage multiple payment gateways to optimise transaction routing? Businesses can optimise transaction routing using intelligent algorithms that automatically select the best gateway based on transaction type, currency, or customer location. Setting up failover mechanisms also ensures that transactions are rerouted in case of gateway failure, improving reliability and efficiency. ### 5. What security measures should businesses implement when utilising multiple payment gateways? Businesses should implement strong encryption, multi-factor [authentication](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-authentication/), and regular security audits when using multiple payment gateways. Compliance with industry standards like PCI DSS is crucial, along with fraud prevention measures such as monitoring transactions for suspicious activity. But with platforms such as Shopify, it is relatively easy to set up an e-commerce website and provide your customers with a great shopping experience. Once your Shopify store is ready, there are a number of payment providers that you can choose from and you want to pick the one that not only offers a lot of options but is also highly secure and understands the needs of your business. Shopify has recently launched a new payments platform, which requires payments providers to build new apps that meet a new set of secure guidelines. So, if your Shopify store is integrated with payment apps that do not comply with the new guidelines, you will not be able to collect customer payments after 31st July 2022. But, do not worry! Razorpay has you covered. On May 1, we launched **Razorpay Secure**, our new payment app on Shopify which meets all new guidelines and makes payments on Shopify stores more secure than ever. The current Razorpay app on Shopify will be removed by July 31, and you will not be able to collect payments with it. The all-new Razorpay Secure will keep your store running without any issues past July 31. **How is Razorpay Secure different from Razorpay payment gateway?** The Razorpay Secure app is [Razorpay’s payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/) especially designed for the Shopify platform. It is an improved app to provide a secure, seamless and delightful payments experience on your online store. Upgrading to Razorpay Secure is mandatory before July 31 to make sure payments on your Shopify store are not disrupted.It’s a 2 minute process that can be completed right now. Find the migration steps in [this guide](https://razorpay.com/docs/payments/payment-gateway/ecommerce-plugins/shopify/migration-steps/). Worried that you will not be able to accept payments on your store after July 31? Don’t be. You can easily integrate the Razorpay Secure payments app on Shopify with zero coding, a 100% digital process and start [accepting payments](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) in a matter of minutes. Follow [this integration guide](https://razorpay.com/docs/payments/payment-gateway/ecommerce-plugins/shopify/) for the step-by-step process. **Benefits of using Razorpay Secure on Shopify:** 1. **_Widest range of domestic and international payment methods:_** Accept payments in 100+ payment modes such as UPI, Debit and Credit Cards, Netbanking, Wallets and Pay Later options. You can collect payments through our [international payment

gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/) in 90+ currencies and via an extensive range of [payment methods](https://razorpay.com/docs/payments/dashboard/settings/payment-methods/) 2. **_Superior checkout experience:_**Get a checkout that is optimised for all devices and screen sizes which makes paying quick, easy and secure for customers. With no redirects and native OTP, retain customer focus on your store. Start and end payments on the same page without redirecting to the bank’s website or UPI mobile app. 3. **_Boost conversions with a comprehensive feature set:_**Get access to more than 11 million [saved cards](https://razorpay.com/docs/payments/payment-methods/cards/features/saved-cards/) which will enable customers to complete payments quickly and efficiently. You can even customize and run offers for specific banks, [card networks](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-a-card-network/), wallets and EMI options to increase conversions and cart value. With trusted badges, instill trust and credibility to reduce drop-offs on checkout. 4. **_[Powerful payments dashboard](https://dashboard.razorpay.com/signin):_**Track payments in real-time and get detailed insights on payments, settlements, refunds to make informed business decisions. Razorpay Secure comes to you with the same terms & conditions. **Don’t wait till July 31 —**go live with Razorpay Secure in a couple of minutes with your existing login credentials for Shopify and Razorpay! Process, Methods, and Challenges [August 22, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/)7 Mins Read [![Image 2: invoice-payment](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Banner-66_Invoice-Payment-1024x536.jpg)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Banner-66_Invoice-Payment.jpg) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fwhat-is-an-invoice-payment%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fwhat-is-an-invoice-payment%2F&text=What%20is%20an%20Invoice%20Payment%3F%20Process%2C%20Methods%2C%20and%20Challenges "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fwhat-is-an-invoice-payment%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=What%20is%20an%20Invoice%20Payment%3F%20Process%2C%20Methods%2C%20and%20Challenges&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fwhat-is-an-invoice-payment%2F "Email") Table of Contents Toggle - [x] * [What is an Invoice Payment?](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#What_is_an_Invoice_Payment) * [How Does the Invoice Payment Process Work? A-Step-by-Step-Guide](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#How_Does_the_Invoice_Payment_Process_Work_A-Step-by-Step-Guide) * [Different Methods for Making Invoice Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#Different_Methods_for_Making_Invoice_Payments) * [Strategies for Effective Invoice Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#Strategies_for_Effective_Invoice_Payments) * [Challenges in Invoice Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#Challenges_in_Invoice_Payments) * [Conclusion](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#Conclusion) * [FAQs](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/#FAQs) ## What is an Invoice Payment? An invoice payment is a scheduled payment initiated by a customer to pay off the balance due for goods or services they have received from a merchant. It includes essential details like the goods or services sold, the payable amount, the _[invoice number](https://razorpay.com/blog/invoice-number/)_, the date, quantities, tax information, payment terms, and credit terms. **Related Read: [_How to Send an Invoice? A Step-by-Step Guide_](https://razorpay.com/blog/how-to-send-an-invoice/)** ## How Does the Invoice Payment Process Work? A-Step-by-Step-Guide The invoice payment process typically involves the following steps: ### **STEP 1: Invoice Capture** * **Receiving invoices:** This can be done through fax, mail, email, or an accounts payable system. * **Data entry:** The invoice details are entered into the accounts payable system. * **Automation:** AP automation can be used to streamline the process and reduce errors. ### **STEP 2: Invoice Approval** * **Checking details:** The invoice details, amounts, and coding are verified. * **Authorized team member:** This step is typically handled by an authorized team member. ### **STEP 3: Payment Authorisation** * **Review and approval:** The invoice is reviewed by designated personnel (controller or CFO). * **Payment authorization:** They give the green light for payment. ### **STEP 4: Payment Execution** * **Payment method selection:** Choose a payment method (checks, ACH transfers, virtual cards). * **Payment processing:** The payment is executed according to the selected method. * **Integration with online payment gateways**: Businesses can process payments faster and more securely by utilizing [online payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/), especially for digital transactions. ### **STEP 5: Archive** * **Storing invoices:** The invoices are stored for future reference. **Related Read: [_What Is Automated Invoice Processing and How to Implement It?_](https://razorpay.com/blog/automated-invoice-processing/)** ## Different Methods for Making Invoice Payments ### 1. Cash Payment * **Physical currency:** Invoices are settled with cash. * **Limited use:** Suitable for small amounts and remote transactions. ### 2. Check Payments * **Traditional method:** Checks are still used, especially for businesses. * **Process:** A check is written and posted to the supplier. * **Drawbacks:** Can be slow, costly, and subject to delays. ### 3. Virtual Cards * **Digital alternative:** Virtual cards are digital versions of credit cards. * **Unique code:** Generate a unique 16-digit code for one-time use. * **Security:** Offers enhanced security compared

to other methods. * **Online transactions:** Ideal for online transactions. ### 4. ACH Payments (Bank Transfers) * **Electronic transfers:** ACH payments are transferred between bank accounts via the ACH network. * **Benefits:** Cost-effective, secure, and faster than checks. * **Common use:** Widely used for recurring payments and large transactions. ### 5. Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT) * **Direct transfer:** EFT involves a direct transfer of funds between bank accounts. * **International payments:** Often used for [international payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/). ### 6. Mobile Payment Apps * **Digital wallets:** Apps like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay allow for contactless payments. * **Convenience:** Offer convenience and security for in-person transactions. ### 7. Online Payment Platforms: * **Web-based payments:** Platforms like PayPal and Stripe facilitate online payments. * **Global reach:** Used for both domestic and international transactions **Related Read:_[What is Invoice Factoring and How Does It Work?](https://razorpay.com/blog/invoice-factoring/)_** ## Strategies for Effective Invoice Payments ### 1. Strategic Payment Scheduling #### **1.1 Timely payments** Ensure prompt payment to maintain positive supplier relationships and avoid late fees. #### **1.2 Aligned schedule** Develop a [payment schedule](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-payment-schedule/) that aligns with your cash flow to optimize financial management. #### **1.3 Reminders and alerts** Utilize reminders or calendar alerts to stay organized and avoid missed due dates. ### 2. Leveraging Automation #### **2.1 Streamlined process** Implement automation tools to streamline [invoice processing](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-invoice-processing/) and [invoice payment](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-an-invoice-payment/). #### **2.2 Error reduction** Reduce manual errors and save time by automating tasks like invoice capture and payment execution. #### **2.3 Integrated systems** Utilize automated systems that seamlessly integrate with your accounting software. ### 3. Effective Negotiation #### **3.1 Mutual benefits** Discuss payment terms with suppliers to find mutually beneficial arrangements. #### **3.2 Flexible options** Explore options like early payment discounts or extended payment periods. #### **3.3 Clear communication** Maintain open communication to establish favorable terms for both parties. ### 4. Adopting Digital Solutions #### **4.1 Faster processing** Embrace digital payment methods like ACH transfers or virtual cards for quicker processing times. #### **4.2 Enhanced security** Benefit from the improved security features offered by digital payment solutions. #### **4.3 Efficient tracking** Gain better visibility and tracking capabilities with digital payment methods. #### **4.4 Software integration** Ensure compatibility with your accounting software for simplified reconciliation. ### 5. Continuous Improvement #### **5.1 Regular assessment** Periodically review your payment processes to identify areas for improvement. #### **5.2 Identify bottlenecks** Pinpoint inefficiencies or bottlenecks in your current system. #### **5.3 Stay updated** Stay informed about emerging payment technologies that can enhance your business operations. **Related Read: [_What is Invoice Reconciliation and How to Reconcile Invoices?_](https://razorpay.com/blog/invoice-reconciliation/)** ## Challenges in Invoice Payments ### 1. Delayed Payments * **Strained relationships:** Late payments can damage supplier relationships. * **Disrupted cash flow:** Delays can disrupt cash flow and lead to late fees. * **Inefficient processes:** Inefficient processes or cash flow issues often contribute to late payments. ### 2. Invoice Discrepancies * **Errors and missing information:** Incorrect amounts or missing data can cause payment delays. * **Time-consuming reconciliation:** Discrepancies require time-consuming reconciliation, slowing down the payment

process. ### 3. Complex Payment Processes * **Bottlenecks:** Multi-step approvals and manual data entry can create bottlenecks. * **Increased risk of errors:** Complex processes increase the likelihood of errors and delays. ### 4. Currency and Exchange Rate Issues * **Fluctuating rates:** International transactions can be complicated by fluctuating exchange rates. * **Unexpected costs or gains:** Volatility can lead to unexpected financial impacts. ### 5. Fraud and Security Risks * **Missing invoices:** Missing invoices can be a sign of fraud or data loss. * **Invoice fraud:** Fake invoices, intercepted payments, or compromised payment systems pose significant risks. * **Security threats:** Cybersecurity threats can lead to financial losses and data breaches. ### 6. Invoice Management Challenges * **Missing invoices:** Lost or misplaced invoices can cause delays and confusion. * **Poor visibility:** Lack of visibility into invoice status can hinder payment management. ### 7. Invoice Processing Delays * **Manual processes:** Manual processing can be time-consuming and error-prone. * **Lack of automation:** Insufficient automation can contribute to delays. ### 8. Compliance Issues * **Non-adherence to regulations**: Failure to comply with regulations can lead to penalties and legal issues. * **Inefficient processes:** Complex processes can make it difficult to adhere to compliance requirements. ### 9. Double Payment * * **Duplicate payments:** Accidental or fraudulent double payments can lead to financial losses. * **Reconciliation challenges:** Identifying and resolving double payments can be time-consuming. _**Related Read:**_[**_What is Invoice Trading?_**](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-invoice-trading/) ## Conclusion Effective invoice payment management is crucial for businesses to maintain healthy financial operations and foster strong supplier relationships. By understanding the various methods for making invoice payments, implementing efficient strategies, and addressing potential challenges, organizations can streamline their payment processes and ensure timely and accurate settlements. ## FAQs ### 1. What are the benefits of paying invoices on time? Timely invoice payments help maintain good supplier relationships and can lead to better terms or discounts. They also prevent late fees and potential legal issues. ### 2. How long do businesses usually have to pay an invoice? Payment terms vary but typically range from ‘net 30’ to ‘net 90’. However, some industries or specific agreements might have shorter or longer payment windows. ### 3. How can I track the status of an invoice payment? Most modern accounting software offers real-time tracking of invoice statuses. You can also use online banking portals to check payment statuses. For manual processes, maintaining a well-organised payment log and regularly communicating with your accounts payable team can help track payments. ### 4. Can invoices be paid automatically through recurring billing or direct debit? Yes, invoices can be paid automatically through [recurring billing](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-recurring-billing/) or direct debit. Both methods save time and ensure you never miss a payment, making things easier for everyone involved. ### 5. Are there any security measures in place to protect invoice payment information? Reputable payment systems use encryption and tokenisation to protect sensitive data. Two-factor authentication is often employed for added security. It’s crucial to use trusted payment platforms and follow best practices like regularly updating passwords and monitoring

accounts for unusual activity. ### 6. What are the benefits of automating invoice payments? Automation reduces manual errors, speeds up processing times, and improves cash flow management. It can lead to significant time and cost savings, especially for businesses handling large volumes of invoices. ### 7. How do international payments affect invoice processing? International payments can complicate invoice processing due to currency conversions, different banking systems, and varying regulations. They may involve additional fees and longer processing times. Their fully integrated product suite covers operations, distribution, marketing, and business intelligence. ## Djubo’s mission: Empowering hotels to take control of their revenue Traditionally, Indian hotels relied heavily on travel agents (offline and online) for bookings. Travel agents captured a staggering 80-85% of bookings, even for large hotels. This dependence left hotels with minimal control over revenue and limited visibility into transactions. Over the last few years, hoteliers have understood the need to exert greater control over sales and revenue to maximize profits. They have thus begun exploring direct booking strategies, creating their own websites and leveraging Google’s metasearch platforms instead of relying entirely on affiliate bookings. This has led to a jump of 35-40% in profits. This is where Djubo’s role becomes pivotal. Djubo empowers hotels by acting as the backbone for hotel operations, handling everything from website creation and meta search marketing to sales, bookings, transactions, settlements, and more. In the entire process, Djubo also manages payments between various parties like Google, OTAs, and hotels. This makes seamless transactions and smooth cash flow critical to business. ## The Challenge: Streamlining the payments process From operations to client satisfaction, the absence of a seamless payments solution affected multiple aspects of Djubo’s business. * **Operational Inefficiencies:**Fee collection and [payment settlement](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-a-payment-settlement/) for services like Google Ads, OTAs from hotel clients was manual, creating overheads and discrepancies. * **Lack of Transparency:** Unclear transaction details and charges led to a lack of transparency among Djubo, vendors and clients. * **Mediocre Client Experience:**Manual intervention was required to settle funds into client accounts, causing delays. These issues eroded trust and led to dissatisfaction among Djubo’s hotel clients. Djubo needed a solution that would streamline operations for both themselves and their clients. ## The Solution: Changing the game with Razorpay Embedded Payments Djubo turned to [Razorpay Embedded Payments](https://razorpay.com/embedded-payments-for-platforms-&-marketplaces/), a first-of-its-kind solution in the industry, to transform their platform and the way they manage their hotel booking management business. * **Frictionless onboarding:**Razorpay [Embedded Payments](https://razorpay.com/learn/embedded-payments/) e nabled client onboarding within Djubo’s platform, eliminating the need to redirect the client elsewhere. The client’s identity could now be verified on the fly, thereby reducing drop-offs. * **Seamless control of funds:** The flow of payments and settlements between hotels and third-party service providers like ad platforms and OTAs

was completely automated. * **Enhanced transparency and reconciliation:** Djubo had access to a feature-rich dashboard to view, reconcile and manage all payments, fees, refunds and settlements across stakeholders and clients in one place. * **Seamless payments:**Djubo now had a powerful checkout within their platform with 100+ payment modes along with industry-leading success rates. (_Want to know more about how you can leverage Embedded Payments to make your business more efficient? Explore_ _[Razorpay Embedded Payments today!](https://razorpay.com/embedded-payments-for-platforms-&-marketplaces/)_) ## The Impact: Zero hassles, delighted clients, and higher revenues Razorpay’s integration ensured a boost in operational efficiency and a jump in revenues for Djubo and their clients. * **Increased Operational Efficiency:**Razorpay Embedded Payments simplifies onboarding clients, managing payments at scale without any overheads * **Enhanced Guest Experience:** A reliable payment gateway with diverse payment options (credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, wallets, and [international payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/)) significantly improved guest convenience and customer loyalty. * **Increased Client Revenue:**A 10% increase in successful transactions along with higher share of direct bookings directly translates to higher revenue for Djubo and its clients > Partnering with Razorpay and integrating the embedded payments stack with our booking engine has been a game-changer for Djubo and our hotel clients. > > > The diverse payment options offered by Razorpay (credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and wallets) have significantly enhanced the guest experience, making transactions smooth and convenient. This collaboration has allowed us to offer a robust and reliable payment solution that perfectly complements our property management platform, ensuring smooth, secure operational efficiency and guest satisfaction. > > > The embedded payment enhancement allows the hotel software provider partners to ensure timely payment settlements to vendors, preventing service discrepancies. > > > As a result, **45% of our hotels using our advanced services will see their payment reconciliation process reduced by at least 80%.** > > > Sankalp Goel, Co-Founder, Djubo Are you in a business that empowers clients on their online journey? # Bhanzu X Razorpay | Bhanzu’s Global Maths Transformation with Razorpay International Payments [![Image 1: Razorpay Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2020/06/Logo.svg)](https://razorpay.com/ "Razorpay Blog") * [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) * [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) * [Exclusive](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/exclusive/) * [Forex](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/forex/) * [Online Commerce](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/online-commerce/) * [Payroll](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payroll/) * [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) * [Inspiration Brew](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/inspiration-brew/) * [Policies with Dr. Poli](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/policies-with-dr-poli/) [Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog) » [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) » The Square Root of Success: Bhanzu’s Global Maths Transformation with Razorpay International Payments In[Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) # The Square Root of Success: Bhanzu’s Global Maths Transformation with Razorpay International Payments [November 12, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/bhanzus-maths-transformation-with-razorpay/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: Bhanzu](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Bhanzu-1-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Bhanzu-1.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbhanzus-maths-transformation-with-razorpay%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbhanzus-maths-transformation-with-razorpay%2F&text=The%20Square%20Root%20of%20Success%3A%20Bhanzu%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Maths%20Transformation%20with%20Razorpay%20International%20Payments "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbhanzus-maths-transformation-with-razorpay%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=The%20Square%20Root%20of%20Success%3A%20Bhanzu%E2%80%99s%20Global%20Maths%20Transformation%20with%20Razorpay%20International%20Payments&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbhanzus-maths-transformation-with-razorpay%2F "Email") Bhanzu began with a clear vision: to simplify math learning and eliminate the widespread fear that math is inherently difficult, especially for students in higher grades. Starting with a group of around 500–600 students who had been following founder Neelakantha Bhanu, Bhanzu treated each learner not just as a customer, but as part of a community. As their reputation grew, so did their student base, revealing just how many learners struggled with math anxiety. From their roots in the Indian subcontinent to the African continent and beyond, Bhanzu expanded globally to address this need. Through each phase of growth, Razorpay has been the payment gateway capable of scaling seamlessly alongside their journey to make math accessible worldwide. Learn more about [Bhanzu](https://bhanzu.com/book-demo) here. ## **Enabling Bhanzu’s Growth** * **More than 3x growth in under 3 year**s: from 11k to 37k students * Razorpay helps cut down onboarding time **from 3 days to 5 minutes**! ## ![Image 3: Bhanzu](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2024/11/Bhanzu-2.png) ## **Challenges in the Payments Space** Early on, Bhanzu recognized that collecting payments was only part of the equation. To truly earn the trust of students and parents, the company needed to ensure a seamless experience from the very start. As they expanded from the Indian subcontinent to regions like **ANZ, GCC, and eventually the US and UK**, managing the volume and pace of sales presented new challenges. The initial payment process was rigorous and required manual verification by the finance team, causing onboarding delays of up to three days. This lag left new students waiting and occasionally led to increased [chargebacks](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-a-chargeback/), especially as the student base grew internationally. Operating across peak times, like the start of the academic year in March-April, and slower periods, like October, highlighted the need for a more flexible, efficient system. Bhanzu needed a scalable payment solution that could not only keep up with global demand but also offer an onboarding experience that reassured students from day one. ## **Solving the Equation** To keep up with the demands of their rapidly growing student base, Bhanzu integrated Razorpay’s robust API directly into their system. With this setup, they could seamlessly initiate payments by generating customized Razorpay links directly from their sales tool. This efficient integration not only streamlined the payment process but also ensured students gained instant access to their dashboard, reinforcing trust right from the start. In an effort to maximize success rates and optimize performance, Bhanzu

designed a payment routing system that prioritizes gateways based on success rates, and Razorpay emerged as the best-performing payment solution provider. When occasional payment issues surfaced, Razorpay’s team promptly addressed and resolved them, offering them a reliable partner that ensured minimal disruption and high responsiveness to their needs. Additionally, Razorpay’s platform provided Bhanzu with **real-time visibility** into every transaction. Detailed data allowed their teams to address issues immediately, including tracking chargebacks and tracing them back to specific causes, ultimately improving communication with students and reducing refund and chargeback concerns. This transparency offered granular insights, empowering their internal teams with a comprehensive view across all levels. As a result of these solutions, Bhanzu saw a significant uplift in revenue, hitting a **record high in September**. With Razorpay’s partnership, they are able to serve students globally and also maintain a high standard of service that builds lasting trust and satisfaction across diverse markets. ## **Looking Ahead** Bhanzu’s journey has always centered around creating a smooth, trusted experience for students from the very first interaction. Moving forward, the goal is to make onboarding as simple as a single click—enabling students to join immediately with an integrated payment button, transforming a once multi-step process into a seamless experience. As they expand and innovate in the education space, the partnership with Razorpay remains an essential part of its commitment to building trusted, efficient, and growth-oriented solutions for students worldwide. # 9 Reasons Why Merchants Love Razorpay for International Payments - Razorpay Blog [![Image 1: Razorpay Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog-content/uploads/2020/06/Logo.svg)](https://razorpay.com/ "Razorpay Blog") * [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) * [Business Banking Plus](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/) * [Exclusive](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/exclusive/) * [Forex](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/business-banking/forex/) * [Online Commerce](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/online-commerce/) * [Payroll](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payroll/) * [Customer Stories](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/customer-stories/) * [Inspiration Brew](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/inspiration-brew/) * [Policies with Dr. Poli](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/policies-with-dr-poli/) [Blog](https://razorpay.com/blog) » [Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/) » [International Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/international-payments/) » 9 Reasons Why Merchants Love Razorpay for International Payments In[International Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/category/payments/international-payments/) # 9 Reasons Why Merchants Love Razorpay for International Payments [June 18, 2024](https://razorpay.com/blog/merchants-love-razorpay-international-payments/)4 Mins Read [![Image 2: 9 Reasons Why Merchants Love Razorpay for International Payments](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Stripe-TOMA-1200-x-628px-3-1024x536.png)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Stripe-TOMA-1200-x-628px-3.png) Share [Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fmerchants-love-razorpay-international-payments%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fmerchants-love-razorpay-international-payments%2F&text=9%20Reasons%20Why%20Merchants%20Love%20Razorpay%20for%20International%20Payments "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fmerchants-love-razorpay-international-payments%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=9%20Reasons%20Why%20Merchants%20Love%20Razorpay%20for%20International%20Payments&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fmerchants-love-razorpay-international-payments%2F "Email") Imagine that you’re the owner of a thriving e-commerce store in India, selling exquisite handcrafted goods to customers across the globe. Orders are pouring in from the US, Europe, and beyond. But there’s a catch – your current payment gateway is failing to keep up with the influx of international transactions, leading to lost sales and frustrated customers! You may wonder if there’s a solution that can handle diverse currencies and provide a seamless experience to accept or receive international payments in India from customers globally. That’s where [Razorpay International Payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/guide-to-international-payments/) steps in, transforming this challenge into a cakewalk. With support for over 160 currencies, extensive fraud protection, and seamless integration, [Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/blog/heres-how-businesses-leverage-the-power-of-razorpay-international-payments/) is designed to break barriers and double your success. You no longer have to rely solely on international payment gateways like Stripe. Now, you have the opportunity to try Razorpay International Payments, enabling you to conquer global markets and elevate your business to new heights! **Razorpay: Every Merchant’s Favorite Choice to Go International!** ![Image 3](https://d6xcmfyh68wv8.cloudfront.net/blog-content/uploads/2024/06/Stripe-TOMA-1200-x-628px-4-1024x536.png) * **Comprehensive Payment Solutions** Our suite covers it all – from major cards like Visa, MasterCard, and Amex to alternative payment methods such as Trustly, Sofort, and Paypal. Whether your customers prefer traditional cards, trending e-wallets, or bank transfers, we’ve got you covered. * **Multi-Currency Support** Whether you’re dealing with dollars, euros, yen, or pesos, Razorpay offers extensive currency coverage across International Card Payments, Alternate Payment Methods, Paypal and multi-currency accounts. With 160+ currencies, including 0 and 3-exponent coverage, Razorpay allows the business to expand globally without worrying about currency coverage. [Razorpay MoneySaver Export Account](https://razorpay.com/blog/money-saver-export-account/) on the other hand offers a local banking experience in 30+ countries, by simplifying international payments for Indian exporters through international wire transfers like [ACH, SWIFT, SEPA, BACS, and Fedwire](https://razorpay.com/blog/a-comprehensive-guide-to-international-wire-transfers/). * **Flexible Billing, Seamless Management** Say goodbye to billing headaches! Razorpay International Payments supports all billing models, whether it’s recurring subscriptions or one-time payments. Plus, our multi-currency reconciliation feature ensures smooth financial management across borders, giving you more time to focus on growth. * **Pioneering Compliance with Video KYC** Razorpay International Payments has advanced global compliance for [export payments](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-are-export-payments/#:~:text=Export%20payments%20are%20when%20a,its%20own%20advantages%20and%20disadvantages.) by integrating [Video KYC](https://razorpay.com/blog/international-payments-razorpays-video-kyc/)(Know Your Customer) into its onboarding process, making it one of the first payment aggregators to meet PA-CB and [OPGSP](https://razorpay.com/blog/opgsp-guidelines-ensuring-trust-safety-razorpay/) guidelines. * **Robust Fraud Protection** [Razorpay Shield](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-upticks-success-rates-razorpay-shield/) – India’s First Payments Risk Suite offers an equipped AI-ML dual [Risk Engine](https://razorpay.com/blog/navigate-payment-risks-with-razorpays-shield-risk-engine/) that offers comprehensive

fraud protection, safeguarding merchants and customers against unauthorized transactions. With advanced fraud detection mechanisms like [3DS 2.0](https://razorpay.com/blog/3ds-2-0-and-what-it-means-for-indian-exporters/) and real-time monitoring, your transactions are protected around the clock. * **Chargebacks Management** While [Chargebacks](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-a-chargeback/) serve as a safety net for consumers, they can be a major pain point for merchants, leading to revenue loss and additional costs. Razorpay International Payments has revolutionized the way you [effectively handle chargebacks](https://razorpay.com/blog/how-razorpay-helps-you-to-handle-chargebacks/) and safeguard your revenue with the best-in-class Chargeback Protection Program. Bid farewell to sleepless nights worrying about chargebacks and fraudulent activities. * **Instant Onboarding, Faster Results** Get started with Razorpay International Payments in a snap! With just a single integration, you’re ready to go global. Plus, our 1-click [Digital FIRS](https://razorpay.com/blog/razorpay-firs-automated-digital-firs/) ensures you get the fastest turnaround time, keeping your business agile and responsive. * **Maximizing your Profits** We believe in transparency and affordability. With competitive exchange rates and transparent fee structures, Razorpay International Payments ensures you get the best value for your money, doubling affordability compared to traditional gateways. * **Best-in-class Success Rates** Our impressive success rate of over 70% ensures that your payments go through seamlessly, helping you capture time-sensitive opportunities and expand your global footprint faster. Our robust partnerships with local acquiring partners enable us to give you and your global customers a seamless payment experience, unbridled by payment failures. **Seize the Global Markets with Razorpay International Payments!** Today, accepting [International Payment gateway](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/)is no longer a luxury but a strategic necessity for business growth. With Razorpay’s comprehensive suite of features, including extensive currency support, robust security, seamless reconciliation, and competitive pricing, merchants can expand their reach, increase revenue, and drive success on a global scale. Whether you’re a [small startup](https://razorpay.com/blog/chess-gaja-checkmating-distance-barriers-with-razorpay-international-payments/) or a [large enterprise](https://razorpay.com/blog/how-fnp-celebrates-unique-bonds-with-razorpay-international-payments/), Razorpay provides the tools and support you need to thrive in the global marketplace. Make the smart choice today and unlock the doors to international success with Razorpay. Ready to take your business global? [Get started now](https://sales.razorpay.com/international-payments/) with Razorpay and revolutionize your international payment experience!
